remedies.condition: Dehydration                   Dehydration occurs when too much fluid is lost from the body through perspiration, vomiting, diarrhea, blood loss, excessive urination, breastfeeding or simply not taking in enough fluids.  Primary treatment for dehydration is rehydrating with water or preferably an oral rehydration solution containing electrolytes.
remedies: [BP] For dehydration; China 3, e3H in an emergency or china 3 2D if chronic
[BP] For diarrhea: Arsenicum album 200c, one dose, followed by Veratrum album 200c + Cuprum metallicum 6c, e2H, to be repeated after every passing stool.
Natrum muriaticum 6x + kali phos 6x e3H to combat dehydration.

China 30c For exhaustion and debility from loss of fluids, sensitivity to drafts, insecurity, uncertainty, hypersensitivity, digestive bloating not relieved by burping, vertigo, bloated abdomen, indifference and apathy, gloominess, ambitious plans at night, headaches caused by dehydration or headache with feeling as though the brain is loose or that the hair is being pulled, scalp sensitivity, dizziness, flushed face, sensation of sand or pressure in the eyes, photophobia, foggy or flickering vision, buzzing in the ears, dyspnea, coughing after meals and bone or joint pain.  The person feels better from pressure, bending double and a warm room and feels worse from a slight touch.

remedies.condition: Dehydration  Continued:  A basic recipe would be ½ tsp salt and 6 level tsp of sugar per liter or quart of water.   Fluoridated water can result in greater thirst and confusion as it has a sedative effect.   Severe dehydration may require immediate medical treatment.  Symptoms of dehydration include thirst, dry mouth and skin, sleepiness and lethargy, scanty dark-colored urine, crying without tears, headache, constipation, dizziness or lightheadedness, low blood pressure, rapid heartbeat and breathing, lack of perspiration, muscle contractions, sunken eyes, shriveled skin lacking in elasticity that doesn’t ‘bounce back’ when pinched, kidney failure, low blood volume shock and delirium or unconsciousness.  Administered one dose every 10-30c, mins as needed based upon severity.  As person’s symptoms diminish in intensity, reduce the frequency of dosage to once every 1-4 hours.
remedies: Phosphoric acid 30c For nervous exhaustion, first mental and then physical, feeling too tired to think or speak, stupor and lack of reaction, apathy and listlessness, pale face and sunken eyes, stumbling easily, fainting, chilliness, weakness, milky looking urine, profuse watery diarrhea and cravings for fruit and juice.  The person feels better from warmth, quiet, being left alone and after diarrhea and feels worse from exertion, cold drafts and being talked to.

Phosphorus 30c For the person who is easily excited but tires quickly, whose energy flares up like a match and then quickly dies out, volatile intensity, cracked skin on hands that is slow to heal, bright red profuse bleeding, painless profuse watery diarrhea, a general thirstlessness but cravings for cold food and drinks, vomiting after food or drinks are warmed in the stomach and hypersensitivity.  Cold applications relieve the head and face but aggravate the neck and chest. The person feels better from darkness, open air, deep rubbing or massage and feels worse from touch, warm food, after exertion, thunderstorms, weather changes and getting wet in hot weather.

Camphora 30c For collapse with icy coldness and aversion to being covered, physical and mental weakness, irritability and quarrelsomeness, anxiety at night with fear of being alone, pains with a cold sensation, weak voice, cramps, diarrhea preceded by chills and a sinking feeling.  The person feels better from thinking about complaints.

Carbo Vegetabilis 30c For the person who wants to be fanned, craves fresh air and cannot bear tight clothing around the waist.  Other symptoms include cold breath, hands, and feet, fear of the dark, distended abdomen with belching and flatulence, labored breathing and a hot head.

Calcarea carbonica 30c For the person who is very anxious and worried about his sanity or worried that people will notice he is going crazy.  Other symptoms include foul smelling vomit, perspiration or diarrhea and cold clammy skin with profuse sweat all over.

Natrum muriaticum 30c For extreme thirst, dry cracked lips and dry mouth, cold sores or blisters on the tongue, profuse watery discharges, profuse sweat when ill, diarrhea in the daytime only, a craving for salt, headache or migraines, constipation and dry crumbly stools.  The person is chilly but dislikes hot weather, feels better from pressure and feels worse from sun and stuffy rooms.

Alumina 30c For dry eyes, skin, mouth and mucous membranes, dry cough, hoarse voice, itching triggered by heat, painful joints, wrinkles, constipation, fatigue, confusion, abnormal cravings for items such as dirt or grass, brittle nails and pain when opening the jaw.

Veratrum album 30c For acute watery diarrhea, icy cold and shivering but also sweating, shock following vomiting, diarrhea or blood loss, fainting, a dazed, indifferent appearance, delirium, skin that is inelastic and feels clammy to the touch, a desire to be covered, great thirst for cold drinks with a desire to suck on ice cubes and aversion to warm food.  The person feels better from warmth and walking.

Arsenicum album 30c For physical weakness with mental restlessness, anxiety and fear of death, constantly changing position, feeling that every bed or chair is uncomfortable, fastidiousness and a need to be in control, obsessing over small details, asthma, digestive problems, panic attacks in the middle of the night or early morning, burning sensations and a craving for hot drinks.

Cuprum metallicum 30c For violent contractive cramps, especially in the fingers and toes, hiccups, a head that feels empty or as though someone poured water over it, chilliness and bluish face.  The person feels worse from vomiting or coughing, bending backward and breathing in cold air and feels better from cold drinks.

Aethusa 30c For nausea or diarrhea with lack of thirst, newborns with ceaseless crying and colic, vomiting or regurgitation within an hour of eating, sweating and weakness, intolerance to milk, anguish and weeping, restlessness and peevishness, whiteness of upper lip or blueness around the mouth, fear of falling asleep, lack of mental focus and clarity and feeling easily confused or distracted.  The person feels worse from warmth, milk, over exertion and eating too frequently and feels better from open air, walking, rest and conversation.

Elaterium 30c For forceful, copious, watery vomiting or diarrhea, weakness, sharp gouty pains in the toes, fingers, instep or knees, yawning, stretching, an impulse to wander away from home at night, orange skin and sciatic pains.

Secale cornutum 30c For exhaustion, cold extremities, tingling limbs, poor circulation, pale, pinched, sunken looking face, bluish skin around the eyes, flabby loose-looking muscles, think, black, watery hemorrhage, a slight wound that keeps bleeding for weeks, profuse, involuntary, painless diarrhea, burning pains all over like sparks falling onto the skin, cold skin with an aversion to being covered, constant discharge of watery menstrual blood between periods, excessive thirst and appetite, menstrual cramps and confusion with fear and suspicion, including doubts about the person’s own sanity.  This person feels better from bathing, stretching, cold air and being uncovered and feels worse from warmth, touch, during pregnancy or before or after menstruating.

Jatropha curcas 30c For nausea and vomiting brought on by hiccups or drinking, great thirst, distended abdomen, burning heat in the stomach with cramps, gurgling abdomen, an intense urge to urinate, sudden, profuse, watery diarrhea, muscle cramps with coldness and pains in the feet and ankles with sensitive heels.  The person feels better from putting hands in cold water.
Nux Vomica 30c For individuals who become dehydrated from too much coffee or alcohol, diarrhea, chilliness and irritability.
Calc phos 6x and Mag phos 6x may reduce muscle cramping associated with dehydration.
Kali phos 6x can be used to alleviate the effects of physical and mental exhaustion.
Aethusa 200c, 2D

remedies.condition: Depression - After a disaster or trauma, depression may result due to internalized grief or anger. Sometimes depression manifests with mainly physical symptoms, and the person suffering may not even realize that he is depressed but may complain of fatigue, sleepiness and lowered immunity and vitality.
remedies: [BP] For emotional shock, grief, anxiety, depression Ignagia 200c, 2D

Ignatia Amara 30c Depression from suppressed grief, yawning, lump in the throat, choking, mood changes, refusal to eat, resists consolation, persistent feelings of regret, defensiveness, immobilized by grief, stabbing headaches and abdominal cramps or cramping back pain.  The person feels better from traveling.

Arsenicum album 30c For perfectionists who are critical of themselves and others.  The person is worse from cold, very sensitive to pain, anxious, insecure, demanding and dependent.  The person may experience despair over imagined threats to material security.

Aurum metallicum 30c For the person with a strong sense of duty.  Highlights include despair, suicidal thoughts and feelings of worthlessness, humiliation and failure.  The person feels better from walking in the open air and feels worse at night, often experiencing insomnia and nightmares.
Calcium carbonicum 30c For fatigue, anxiety, withdrawal, feeling overwhelmed by stress, chilly but sweats easily, insomnia, sluggishness, anxiety when away from home, discouragement and self-pity.

Causticum 30c For mental dullness and forgetfulness, obsessive checking and rechecking of things he worries he left undone due to absentmindedness, frequent tears, strong sense of justice and deep sympathy for others, homesickness, anger over injustice and depression over the cruelty and suffering in the world.

Natrum carbonicum 30c For the person who hides feelings from others, with digestive problems, intolerance to dairy, listens to sad music, avoids company despite loneliness, cares deeply for loved ones and is sensitive to loss, disappointment or betrayal, avoiding conflict and physically sensitive.

Natrum muriaticium 30c For the person who is stoic, sensitive, serious, and dignified with strong inner feelings that are not expressed outwardly, with bottled up feelings that lead to depression, averse to being consoled, can react with irritation or anger, brooding, cries only when alone, cries when listening to music, easily offended, can be vindictive, migraines, fatigued by bright, hot sunlight, photophobia, back pain and a craving for salt.

Phosphorucum Acidum 30c For the person who feels that all the zest has gone out of life, is indifferent to everything, experiences drowsiness alternating with insomnia, feels isolated and immobile with spaciness, memory loss, difficulty finding the right word, hair loss, diarrhea and homesickness.

Pulsatilla 30c Primarily used for women who crave sweets and put on weight from depression, are weepy and clingy, sensitive and yielding but also whiny, jealous and moody.  The person feels better from fresh air and gentle exercise.

Sepia 30c For weariness and irritability, overwhelmed mothers, people who are angry and indifferent towards loved ones, loss of libido, bearing down sensation in the uterus and difficulty explaining symptoms.  This person feels better after vigorous exercise.

Staphysagria 30c For suppressed anger that results in depression alternating with eruptions of rage.  The person is quiet, sensitive and a workaholic.  Other symptoms include strong libido, insomnia, headaches, stomachaches and toothaches from stress.  This person finds it hard to stand up for himself.
Aurum met 200c, eoD or e2-3D, depression/side effects add Coffea 200c. (detox course)
Hepar Sulph 200, eoD.    see Eczema

Silica: when there is pain in the contracted tissue cords upon moving the fingers.  The affected finger flexes onto the palm.  Useful when opening the finger causes intense pain.  There is excessive sweating on the hand.                                                              Causticum: useful for later stages of this disease.  There is severe contractures in the hand which leads to beding the fingers towards the palm.  Useful when patient is unable to move the affected fingers without the help of the other hand.  Also usefu when complete deformity of the finger is present.  There is drawing and tearing pain felt in hands.  Useful when hands and fingers feel icy cold.                                                               Ruta:  when there are nodes on the palms of the hand.  There is pain and stiffness in the hands with contracted fingers.                                                                Colocynthis: use when pain in the palms is present.  There is contraction in the hands and fingers.  Useful when there is difficulty to open the finger, and the pain gets worse at rest.                                                                                                                  Rhus Tox: for those that have a history of a hand injury.  There is movement of fingers with great difficulty.  Useful for aching or drawing pain.  There is heat sensation in the palm of the hand.

remedies.condition: DYSENTERY - For the treatment of dysentery symptoms consider the following remedies. In all cases, administer one dose every 15 minutes, reducing frequency as symptoms improve, and then reassess.
remedies: Aconitum 30c - For the first stages of dysentry. Stools are frequent, bloody or slimy and scanty with tenesmus (inability to complete a bowel movement). The person may pass nothing but blood. Other symptoms include hot dry skin, fever with restlessness and anxiety and fear of death. The person feels worse on warm days and cold nights
Ferrum Phosphoricum 30c - This remedy is helpful for the first stages of dysentery without tenesmus. Symptoms are similar to Aconite but less acute.

Aloe 30c - For stools that pass with great effort, are jelly-like with copious bloody mucus and are accompanied by burning and pain in the rectum. The person has a fear of passing gas because stool leaks out. Rectal bleeding may also be present. The person often has a headache along with intestinal symptoms. Aloe is helpful in chronic cases and is also excellent for inflammatory dysentery. For hemorrhoidal dysentery, Aloe can be alternated with Hamamelis

Apis Mel 30c - For chronic dysentery with throbbing in the rectum. The anus may feel as though it is stuffed full. The person experiences frequent, painless, bloody stools (especially in small children). The person feels worse in the morning.

Arsenicum 30c - For the person with undigested, slimy, bloody, blackish brown, sparse, smelly stools, mixed with blood, and burning in the digestive tract, particularly in the rectum. The person may scream out in pain during evacuation. After passing stool, the person feels exhausted. Other symptoms include tenesmus and burning of the anus and rectum after the stool passes, involuntary discharges from the bowels, simultaneous diarrhea and vomiting, a feeling as if the stomach could burst, extreme thirst for small sips of liquid, restlessness and fear of death. The person feels worse at night or after eating or drinking.
Baptisia 30c - For the person with tenesmus without pain but offensive stool and vomit. This remedy is also used for fever in older people

Belladonna 30c - For dysentery in children and youth, think of Belladonna. The child has frequent bloody diarrhea that may be involuntary, accompanied by rectal pain, a flushed face and a hot head. The abdomen is sensitive to touch. The child feels better when semi-erect and feels worse from being touched, from noise, from drafts or from lying down.

Cantharis 30c - For bloody and slimy stool and tenesmus accompanied by painful urination, unquenchable thirst and colic-like pain that causes the person to double over, which does not ease the pain. The person feels worse after eating or drinking.

remedies.condition: DYSENTERY - For the treatment of dysentery symptoms consider the following remedies. In all cases, administer one dose every 15 minutes, reducing frequency as symptoms improve, and then reassess.
remedies: Capsicum 30c - For frequent small stools with tenesmus, colicky flatulence, burning in the rectum and twisting pains around the navel before defecating. The person shivers when they drink and feels worse from breezes, even if they are warm. The symptoms begin in moist weather.
Chamomilla 30c - For watery diarrhea with abdominal pain and gas, flushed red face, irritability and hypersensitivity. The diarrhea is hot and has a greensih color. Heat makes the person feel worse.
Cinnaberis 30c - For bloody mucus in the stool that is worse at night. The person strains so much that the anus protrudes while passing stool.

Colchicum 30c - For bloody stool with great weakness and exhaustion. The person experiences painful urging but at first only a little stool passes, then mostly mucus passes. This brings some relief of abdominal pain. This person feels extreme nausea from smelling cooking odors.

Colocynthis 30c - For stools with bloody mucus that look like scrapings of the intestinal wall. The person experiences a great urgency to stool, with cutting abdominal pain and violent colicky cramping pains around the navel. The person doubles over to relieve the pain, and, unlike Cantharis, this makes them feel better.

Gelsemium 30c - For diarrhea accompanied by trembling, weakness, lethargy, fever, chills and headache. Ipecac 30c - For bloody stools with a fermented odor and green or frothy appearance and when large quantities of mucus are expelled. Straining contributes to constant and/or extreme nausea. Other symptoms include cutting pain around the navel, a body that is stiff from nausea and pain, no thirst and lack of appetite with aversion to even the thought of food.

Lachesis 30c - For very foul bloody/slimy stools and gas with a sensation of constriction of the anus, tearing or burning pain in the abdomen with painful distension, inability to bear any pressure on the abdomen at all, even the sensation of clothing, and shivering without being cold.

Mercurius Cor 30c - For intense and painful tenesmus with a burning anus that is not relieved by defecating, constant cutting abdominal pain and severe rectal pain after defecating. The stools are almost entirely blood or bloody mucus.
Mercurius Sol 30c - This remedy is similar to Merc Cor. The distinguishing signs include feeling worse at night and profuse sweating, especially on the head.
Muriatic Acid 30c - For profuse, dark brown stool with mucus and blood. Movement of the body stimulates urgency to empty bowels.

Nitric Acid 30c - Use this remedy after the mercurials if they cease to act. Symptoms include an ineffectual urge to empty the bowels, burning pain in the rectum and bloody stools with mucus. Defecating does not relieve the tenesmus. Headache follows.

Nux Vomica 30c - For thin bloody mucus mixed with lumps of stool, frequent urging before stool but nothing comes out and relief of pain after the stool is finally passed. The person feels irritable in general and worse in the morning.

Phosphorus 30c - For a weak or empty feeling in the abdomen, followed by profuse and watery diarrhea, a desire for large amounts of cold drinks that may not sit well in the stomach, fearfulness and restlessness.

remedies.condition: DYSENTERY - For the treatment of dysentery symptoms consider the following remedies. In all cases, administer one dose every 15 minutes, reducing frequency as symptoms improve, and then reassess.
remedies: Podophyllum 30c - For diarrhea that is painless but profuse and watery, accompanied by a headache, gurgling in the abdomen before stool and urging that reappears soon afterward. The person feels worse in the morning and in hot weather.

Pulsatilla 30c - For diarrhea with changeable appearance accompanied by a lack of thirst. The person feels worse from warmth or in a stuffy room, feels better from open air and craves sympathy and attention.

Sulphur 30c - For long-standing cases of dysentery, think of Sulphur. Symptoms include slimy hot diarrhea with great urgency in the early morning and great burning in the digestive tract, constant tenesmus that never really goes away, frequent, sudden urging, itchy, red, irritated anus and burning and itching hemorrhoids.

Formica Rufa 30c - For a dry, sore, inflamed and burning throat with pain that radiates up to the ears. The person feels worse in cold and feels better when warm and while applying pressure to or rubbing the throat.
Opium 30c - For the person who drifts in and out of consciousness. The face is cyanotic, and the breathing is congested, heavy and labored.

Arsenicum Album 30c - Use when the throat, larynx and trachea are painful and raw with laryngitis. Other symptoms include loss of voice, a high-pitched sound while breathing and a constricted sensation in the throat.
Nux Vomica 30c - For a rough, scratchy sore throat, a hoarse voice or loss of voice, a swollen throat with a sensation of choking or constriction and fast, anxious breathing.
Spongia 30c - For inflammation of the respiratory tract with difficulty breathing, a barking cough and pain. Spongia is used in cases with a slower onset than Aconitum.
Phosphorus 30c - For a sensation of throat swelling and constriction, hoarse voice (or no voice) and respiratory distress.
Hepar Sulph 30c - For a painful sore throat with discharge of pus, painful and swollen trachea and larynx, difficulty swallowing and a choking or constricted sensation in the throat.
Belladonna 30c - For hoarseness or loss of voice, swelling of the throat and constriction of the larynx.
Coca 30c, - For trouble breathing, anxiety, loss of voice and fainting.
Rumex Acetosa 30c - For a dry, unremitting short cough coupled with inflammation of the esophagus.

Antimonium Tartaricum 30c - For the person who finds it difficult or impossible to swallow due to swelling and inflammation in the throat, with a sensation of choking and hoarseness or a total loss of voice.
Carbo Vegetabilis 30c - For a swollen throat making it difficult or impossible to swallow, rattling sounds from the trachea, impeded breathing, hoarseness or loss of voice.

remedies.condition: Exhaustion, Overwork, Fatigue, Sleep, Deprivation, Burnout  -              Prolonged or severe illness, stress, overwork and lack of sleep can result in both physical and mental exhaustion.  Stress and sleep deprivation can precipitate a cascade of physical changes throughout the body, including reflux, heartburn and other digestive problems resulting from adrenaline surges that cause the upper digestive tract valves to stay open, cicadian rhythm changes that result in chronic sytemic inflammation, increased levels of cortisol, resulting in temporal lobe shrinkage that can affect memory and mental focus and a host of other effects that can lead to various chronic or acute illnesses.  It is well known that tiredness can increase the risk of accidents due to forgetfulness, lack of mental alertness and focus, slowed reaction time, clumsiness and impaired coordination, impaired judgement and decreased ability to learn.  Exhaustion can also lead to low serotonin, which causes depression, anxiety and insomnia. Other symptoms of overwork or burnout include lowered immunity to illness, apathy and loss of interest in relationships or formerly enjoyed activities.    Sleep is crucial for recovery.
remedies: [BP] For exhaustion or overwork: Phosphoric acid 200c, 2D.
[BP] For insomnia: Coffea cruda 200c, 1 dose before bed for days or weeks until improvement is seen.

Phosphoric Acid 30c For emotional exhaustion, apathy and indifference, physical weakness from grief or loss of fluids, worn-out, pale and thin in appearance, blue skin around the eyes, memory problems with an inability to think of the right word, slow thinking, suffering in silence, chilly with a poor appetite, great thirst, aversion to company, nervous exhaustion followed by physical exhaustion, fatigue following an illness, listlessness and apathy, dizziness, difficulty coping, depression, sensitivity to music, weakness in the back and legs and a burning feeling in the spine.

Never apply pressure to an injured eye.  In case of hyphema (bleeding within the eyeball, where the iris of the eye is located), DO NOT give aspirin, as this thins the blood and can cause too much blood to build up in the eye.  Do not put any eye drops in the eye, and do not let anyone other than a trained ophthalmologist put eye drops into the eye.  Eye drops designed to dilate the pupil should not be used when hyphema is present.

remedies.condition: EYE INJURY - [I make my own tinctures of St. John’s Wort from the flowers that grow on the hillside where I live in wester New York.  After gathering St. John’s Wort in late August and September, I immediately immerse the plants in the highest alcohol content vodka or grain alcohol I can find.  I fill an amber jar to the top with the flowers and leaves and cover thoroughly with the alcohol.  I keep this in a darkened cupboard for a fortnight, after which I decant the liquid into small dropper bottles.  Note: Be certain you know which plant is St. John’s wort (Hypericum perforatum) before entertaining this project.
remedies: I keep Calendula and St. John’s Wort tinctures on hand for the eventuality of an eye injury, although these are not homeopathic but botanical they can be of great use in a eye emergency, if they are made in alchol as most herbal tinctures are it is accepted botanical procedure to  Dilute to 1:20, that is 1 drop of tincture to 20 drops of water. I usually place the drops of the diluted tincture directly in the eye.  If this is not possible, the method of choice is to dab a sterile cloth in the mixture and hold it to the eye, allowing the solution to enter the eye as much as possible. This would be done constantly for more severe wounds and up to every few hours for those not as serious.
The great minds of the homeopathic world say that even after medical care, continued use of the above remedies will help to prevent infections and will leave the patient in a better state.
Aconitum Napellus 30c, is BEST REMEDY for any injury to the eye.  Especially for acute inflammation, minor abrasions, a sensation of sand in the eye, and when there is sensitivity to light.

Ledum Palustre 30c, Should the injury occur to the orbital bone around the eye with the threat of a black eye.  Ledum is particularly indicated for a blow to an area where the bone is not covered with fat or muscle.  That includes the nose and the area around the eye, as will as the shins.
Ledum Palustre 30c,  is also indicated when the injury to the eye is a puncture.  It should be repeated every few minutes until medical help can be obtained.
Arnica Montana 30c, after a blow from a blunt object if there is blood in the eye, double vision, or the individual sees “floaters” after an accident.
Symphytum 30c, when there is pain and bruising in the eyeball without swelling, or when the eyeball looks as though it has lost fluid or is no longer smooth.

Hamamelis Virginiana 30c, for irritation of the optic nerve with soreness and sensitivity to light and for bleeding inside the eyeball.

Euphrasia 30c, Is traditionally used for allergic reactions that leave the eye bloodshot
Physostigma 30c, when the eyelids cannot be opened or there is a twitching of the eye muscles.
Silicea 30c, to help remove foreign objects from the eye.

Aconitum 30c - Fever with quick onset and sudden high temperature. Intense, dry, burning heat alternating with coldness and chills. One cheek red and hot, the other pale and cold. If you don't catch the fever within the first 12 hours of illness, don't bother with this remedy. It won't be the correct choice at that point.

Belladonna 30c - Best remedy to try first, give during early stages. Very high fever, face flushed bright red from heat and eyes glassy with dilated pupils. May appear delirious. Hot skin, restless and agitated.

Chamomilla 30c - Fevers accompanying teething. Fractious, unable to be comforted, and irritable. Child may beg to be picked up, but then demand to be put down again. If you see a child arching his back in frustration while being held, this is a good indication that Chamomilla is the remedy required.

Nux Vomica 30c - Extremely chilled, worsened by moving or removing blankets. Symptoms can be triggered by overindulgences. Can be accompanied by digestive symptoms or heaviness in head. Can be worse in the morning and in the open air.

Bryonia 30c - Fever accompanied by dry cough. Pain spreads all over the body. Aversion to company, wants to lie quiet. Thirst for large quantities of water at long intervals.

remedies.condition: Gastro, General Vomiting, Diarrhea, Nausea, Abdominal Pain: Choose from the following remedies for general stomach and abdominal problems. Administer one dose every 10-30 minutes up to 6 doses. Then continue with longer time intervals between doses.
remedies: Arsenicum Album 30c - For relentless vomiting and diarrhea, abdominal cramping and rectal burning, when even the smallest amount of water will cause vomiting. Symptoms often appear after midnight. The person desires company and comfort. Due to exhaustion and internal coldness, the person wants to bundle up under the covers even if it contributes to feverishness. Other indicators include restlessness, frequently changing position and fear of dying.

Veratrum Album 30c - For violent and voluminous diarrhea with vomiting that may be simultaneous, greenish and watery stools and abdominal cramping that may be relieved by diarrhea. The symptoms because worse with motion, and even walking can bring on a wave of nausea or vomiting. The person is commonly chilly, weak and very thirsty for cold water.
Nux Vomica 30c - For much bilious vomiting, nausea and retching. The person is irritable and snappy.

Ipecac 30 - The worst and most extreme nausea possible indicates a need for Ipecac. The symptoms are relentless, and even vomiting brings no relief. The person is not very ill except for perhaps a fever and some weakness, but the vomiting is nearly non-stop. Pains may appear in the abdomen with much gas, and the stool may be green. These symptoms sometimes appear after excessive eating.

Phophorus 30c - For a great deal of vomiting with diarrhea, involuntary passage of stool, restlessness and desire for cold drinks such as ice water or sparkling drinks. The smallest ingestion induces vomiting.

Bryonia 30c - For violent abdominal pain and severe vomiting where the person cannot keep anything down, even small sips of water. The person wants to lie perfectly still in the fetal position, and any change of position causes waves of nausea and vomiting.

Pulsatilla 30c - For nausea, bloating, colicky pain, burping up spoiled food, bad taste in the mouth, dry mouth (but not thirsty) and restlessness. The symptoms improve from slow walking. The person cannot lie still and desires fresh air.
Carbo Veg 30c - For acute indigestion with accumulation of gas in the abdomen. The stomach is distended (worse when lying down at night), and a great deal of belching brings relief.

China 30c - For a distended, bloated stomach with constant belching that does not bring relief. Firm pressure on the stomach brings some relief. Other symptoms include diarrhea after eating, loud rumbings in the stomach with much passing of gas and yellow painless stools.

remedies.condition: Grief - Grief is a normal and healthy reaction to loss or betrayal.  However, grief can be internalized, denied or dealt with in an unhealthy manner, leading to chronic problems that can manifest emotionally, mentally and physically.  To help process grief in a balanced and rational manner, homeopaths recommend:
remedies: Ignatia 30c This is the remedy of first choice for grief. Symptoms include changeable moods, alternating between laughing and crying, convulsive sobbing that comes in bursts, tries to control weeping and wants to be alone, cry, sighing, sensation of a lump in the throat, refusal to eat, resisting consolation, persistent feelings of  regret,defensiveness, stabbing headaches and abdominal cramps or cramping back pain. The person feels better from traveling.

remedies.condition: Heat Cramps, heat Exhaustion, Heatstroke, Hyperthermia           Heat cramps are caused by loss of salt through perspiration.  If unaddressed at this stage, dehydration and loss of salt can progress to heat exhaustion and eventually heatstroke.  Heat stroke (sunstroke) can lead to shock, organ failure, brain damage and death.  Hyperthermia is the medical term for dangerously elevated body temp.  In addition to prolonged exposure to high temps or humidity, heatstroke can also result from over-exercise, dehydration, excessive alcohol use or drugs such as antihistamines, diuretics, diet pills, antidepressants, antipsychotics, sedatives, tranquilizers, stimulants, cocaine, meth, seizure meds, heart and blood pressure meds.  Symptoms of heat overexposure include thirst, muscle cramps, fatigue, faintness and profuse perspiration.
remedies: [BP] For heat stroke; Aconite 200c e15M
[BP] For delirium; Stramonium 200c e3D; Hyoscyamus Niger 6c e3H.

Apis 30c For puffy face and eyelids, swelling with stinging, prickly pain, scanty urine output, drowsiness and irritability.  The person feels better from cold applications and feels worse from warmth.

Belladonna 30c For sudden onset, hot, red face, dry skin, throbbing pulsating headache, glassy, red bloodshot eyes, dilated pupils, cold body and hot head, a blank stare, involuntary stool or urination, twitching limbs, extremely deep sleep, delirium, drowsiness, buzzing in the ears, constricted chest and loss of consciousness.  The person feels better from bending the head backward and feels worse from light, noise, lying down or being jarred.

Bryonia 30c For severe splitting headache, nausea, great thirst, irritability and a thirst for large quantities of water.  The person feels better from rest and cold applications and feels worse from the slightest motion.  This person wants to lie down and be left alone.  Sitting up results in nausea.

Cantharis 30c For blistering sunburn with smarting pain, restlessness and great thirst, constant urge to urinate, great inflammation, delirium, sudden loss of consciousness, red face, a sensation of boiling water in the brain and a burning feeling in the soles of the feet at night.  The person feels better from cold applications.

Glonoinum 30c For the person whose eyes are glazed over with a blank, fixed look, contracted pupils, cold sweats, cold body with a hot head, racing or barely perceptible pulse, exhaustion so severe that speech is impossible, bursting or throbbing pains in the head and body, dark ‘floaters’ in the vision, clenched jaws, pale face, fixed eyes, white tongue, dyspnea, vomiting preceded with headaches, sinking feeling at the pit of the stomach and inability to lay the head down on a pillow.  The person feels worse from bending the head backward.

Aconitum 30c For symptoms that come on extremely quickly, agitation, restlessness, fear and anxiety, contracted pupils, a strong pulse and a feeling of heat throughout the whole body, not concentrated in the head as in Glonoinum and Belladonna.

Natrum Carbonicum 30c For long-term problems following heatstroke, headaches that recur in hot weather, marked weakness and debility from sun and on exertion, nausea and vomiting, faintness, dizziness and confusion.

Gelsemium 30c For slow onset, headache and cerebral congestion, disconnected delirium, cloudy or double vision, lack of thirst, muscle pain as though from exercise, drunken appearance, droopy eyelids and coma.

Lachesis 30c For dizziness and faintness, extreme fatigue from hot weather and inability to bear tight constrictive clothing, especially around the neck.  The person is talkative with constant complaining and feels worse after sleep.

Carbo Veg 30c For weakness or collapse from heat, cold, clammy skin with profuse sweating all over, a suffocating feeling with a desire to be fanned, eye pain, fixed staring, nausea, diarrhea, heaviness and congestion in the head, headache centered in the forehead, stupor, flatulence and an inability to bear tight clothing around the abdomen.

Hernia is the protrusion of an organ through the muscle or tissue that normally holds it in place. A hernia can be internal or external . The most common type of hernia occurs when the small intestine pushes through the abdominal wall. Intestinal protrusions can strangulate and may require surgery. Symptoms include a bulge or protrusion in abdomen or stomach, pain around the bulge, flatulence, vomiting and constipation.

remedies.condition: Hypothermia, Frostbite, Trenchfoot, Chilblains          If the body temp drops to 95F or lower, hypothermia occurs, and normal bodily functions become impaired.  This usually happens when exposure to cold temps causes one to lose heat faster than the body can produce it.  Immersion in cold water or lack of shelter, adequate clothing or blankets and lack of food in a cold environment can all result in such a deficit.  Prolonged loss of body heat can lead to heart and respiratory failure and eventually death.   Signs of hypothermia include constant shivering, slow shallow breathing, slurred speech, and poor decision making ability, blue or puffy skin, numbness, loss of consciousness, drowsiness, sluggishness, lethargy and apathy, confusion and clumsiness.   Get person as dry as possible, out of the cold, remove wet clothing, cover him with dry blankets or coats, making sure to cover his head but leave breathing access.  Skin-to-skin contact is the best way to share body heat.  DO NOT massage or rub the skin.  Apply warm dry compresses, such as warmed towels, to the head, torso and groin but NOT direct heat, as it can damage skin or cause heart failure.

Pulsatilla 30c Use when the affected area feels hot and itchy long after being thawed.  Other symptoms include soles of the feet that itch in the warmth of a bed, swelling, throbbing pains, vivid red, reddish brown or bluish skin and craving open air.  The person feels worse from heat or being in a warm room, is weepy and wants comfort and feels worse from a lack of attention and sympathy.

remedies.condition: Hypothermia, Frostbite, Trenchfoot, Chilblains Continued:     DO NOT immerse the person in a warm bath or apply heat to the limbs, as this may force cold blood back toward the heart and cause a drop in the core body temperature.  If person is conscious and able to swallow, warm sugary drinks will help raise his temperature and prevent dehydration.   Frostbite is a term used to describe frozen body tissue.  Prolonged exposure to temps below 30f or high winds at a higher temp may cause skin to freeze.  The most commonly affected areas of body are fingers, toes, cheeks, ears, and noses.  Signs include numbness, tingling or stinging pains, a waxy white appearance to the skink, with a hard texture that becomes bluish or gray as damage progresses or redness and swelling with blisters.  Severe frostbite can affect the deeper tissues below the skin and can lead to gangrene. Frozen tissues are particularly prone to traumatic damage.  Treating hypothermia and warming the core takes precedence over treating frostbite.  Frostbitten skin in a person who is NOT suffering from hypothermia is best treated with immersion in water around 104-110F until circulation, color and sensation have returned.  Overly warm or hot water may burn the skin and result in permanent damage.  Numb frostbitten skin may not be able to discern temperature of water, so make sure to test it on healthy skin.
remedies: Rhus Tox 30c For dark red, intolerably itchy skin, blotchiness after scratching, inflammation, restlessness, aching muscles that become worse in the cold and damp, and burning and itching that is worse at night and in the evening.  The person feels better from changing position.
Nux Vomica 30c For minor inflammation, bright red swelling, burning itch and cracked, bleeding skin.  The person is irritable and angry and refuses to accept the situation.

Abrotanum 30c For loose, flabby skin, itching and purplish skin after suppressed eruptions.  The person feels better from movement and feels worse from cold air, wet weather and suppression of symptoms.

Petroleum 30c For chapped or deeply cracked, bleeding skin, inflamed, red, swollen, painful heels and feeling clammy with foul smelling moisture.  The physical symptoms are similar to Nux Vomica, but instead of irritability and anger, the person has a concern for settling affairs before impending death.

Arsenicum Album 30c For great exhaustion, death-like paleness of the face, severe frostbite, gangrene, black icy coldness, anxiety, restlessness, fussiness, fear coldness felt within the stomach and chest, burning pains, ulcers or blisters and chilliness.  The person wants to be wrapped up warm and tight but with the head uncovered, is thirsty for small sips of warm drinks and feels worse from any exertion and from being left alone.

Sulphur 30c For burning itching made worse from warmth and from standing, redness and swelling, cracks on joints, ulcerated blisters, smelly discharges and dry rough skin.  The person displays a healthy appetite and seems strong and well able to cope but has an aversion to bathing.

Zincum Metallicum 30c For violent itching and swelling, fidgety feet with sensitive soles, twitching and convulsions, pain that feels as though it is between the skin and the flesh and anemia.  The person feels better after eating and from discharges and the appearance of eruptions and feels worse from touch and wine.
Belladonna 30c For fiery redness with swelling and inflammation and pulsing, throbbing pains that come and go suddenly.
Phosphorus 30c For bluish-red chilblains that burn and itch violently, great thirst, craving for cold drinks, flushed face and bright red bleeding.  The person wants company and to be taken care of.

Carbo Vegetabilis 30c “corpse reviver” is used for icy cold, blue skin, a head that is hot and sweaty, a suffocated feeling, a desire to be fanned, cold accelerated breaths, pain throughout the body while warming up, feeling of disconnection and unreality until the pain sets in and a bloated abdomen with gassiness.

Cuprum Metallicum 30c for cramps, spasms and convulsions, blue face, lips, and nails, nausea, cyanosis, dyspnea alternating with vomiting, violent cough causing breathlessness, gurgling cough, hiccups and a head the feels empty or as though someone poured water over it.  The person feels worse from coughing, bending backward and breathing in cold air and feels better from cold drinks.

Veratrum Album 30c for dazed appearance, a blank look with seeming indifference, extreme collapse, coldness and blueness, pale face with a cold sweaty forehead, rapid but weak pulse, feeling as if a lump of ice is on top of the head, inelastic skin that feels clammy to the touch and a desire to be covered.

remedies.condition: Hypothermia, Frostbite, Trenchfoot, Chilblains Continued:  Body heat may also be used to warm the affected area. After warming, the affected skin should be wrapped in dry sterile gauze and protected from cold or movement. Only warm the skin ONCE. After warming, if the skin is re-exposed to cold or movement, such as walking on frozen feet, more severe damage will result. It is better NOT to warm the skin until exposure to cold and movement can be avoided. Trench Foot is caused by prolonged exposure of the feet to cold and wet conditions, from being immersed in water or wearing wet socks and shoes.  Symptoms include cold, blotchy skin, tingling and itching of the affected area, cramping, pain, swelling and blisters, ulceration and tissue death.  It is possible to lose part of the foot or even the whole foot. In trench foot the damage comes not from frozen tissues but from loss of circulation, making the area even more susceptible to damage than frozen tissue would be.   Chilblains refers to a condition where exposure to cold causes permanent damage to the small blood vessels in the skin, usually to the cheeks, ears, fingers or toes.  This results in redness and itching that returns with each additional exposure.  Additional symptoms include blistering, inflammation and possibly ulceration. Warm the skin slowly and avoid scratching.  Ulcers or blisters should be kept clean dry and covered.
remedies: Antimonium Tart 30c For a sensation of cold water running through the veins, face that is cold to the touch, blue, pale skin with cold sweat, trembling of chin and lower jaw, chills, shivering, muscular pains all over the body, drowsiness and rattling mucus in the chest.

Lachesis 30c For purple or blackish skin with swelling and itching, constant talking and complaining, inability to bear tight, constrictive clothing, especially around the neck, easy profuse bleeding of sores.

Hepar sulph 30c For extreme sensitivity to cold air or drafts, deep cracks in the skin, skin that is damaged by the slightest injury, physical and mental oversensitivity, irritability, hastiness in speech and actions, peevishness, hypochondria, anxiety, especially if unreasonably anxious.  The person wants to be wrapped up, even his face, cannot bear to be uncovered, even in a warm room or in warm weather, has an aversion to fresh air and feels better from warmth.
Heloderma 30c For the person who cannot seem to get warm and feels cold to the bone from within.
Reserpinum 30c For slowing of the mind, paralysis, weakened muscles, total lack of movement and nerves that feel close to the surface of the skin.

remedies.condition: MRSA, skin (Methicillan Resistant Stapholoccocus Aureus  Choose one and give e15min                                                        MRSA: Methicillan Resistant Stapholoccocus Aureus is a form of staph infection that is resistant to pharmaceutical antibiotics and can lead to a serious infection.  Natural topical treatments can be used to clean wounds.  Manuka honey has natural antibacterial properties.  Garlic and colloidal silver are also potent antiviral/antibacterial natural tonics.  Hydrogen peroxide is also helpful for cleansing the wound.  Grapefruit seed extract can be taken both internally and applied externally.  Be sure to dilute grapefruit seed extract.  Follow the directions on your bottle carefully.  Other topical remedies include Calendula tincture wash (1 part Calendula tincture to 4 parts distilled water) applied to the wound site.  This can be alternated with Hypericum tincture was (1 part Hypericum tincture to 4 parts distilled water) applied to the wound site.
remedies: Apis Mellifica 30c - For swelling at the wound site, aggravated by heat and pressure. The symptoms are better with cold applications, movement, sitting upright and open air.
Arsenicum Album 30c - For intense anxiety, a feeling of being poisoned and yellow or light green pus.

Cactus Grandiflora 30c - For a sensation of constriction as from an iron band, sharp pain and distinctive “hard” swelling, with bite-like dark dots surrounded by a large area of light red, possibly accompanied by fever.
Cantharis 30c - For great restlessness and anxiety, severe burning pain and a constant need for movement. The site of infection has a dark, angry look.
Crotalus Horridus 30c - Use if the site is dark red and shiny with blood oozing through the center of the site.
Lachesis 30c - Use when the pain is left sided and worse in bed and upon waking.
Mercurius 30c - For trembling and impulsive behavior. The person feels worse from both heat and cold.
Pyrogenium 30c - For blood poisoning (sepsis)
Rhus Tox 30c - Use when restlessness and anxiety are accompanied by itching. The person feels better after warm applications or pressure and feels worse in bed at night.
Sulphur 30c - Use when the skin is very hot and itchy, which becomes worse at night and after bathing. The person may take on a slovenly appearance.
Hypericum 30c - For pain management of the wound site and surrounding tissues, particularly if the pain is neuralgic (shooting pains or pain along a nerve).

Natural topical treatments to clean wound: Manuka honey, garlic and colloidal silver, hydrogen peroxide, diluted grapefruit seed extract (taken internally and applied externally). Calendula tincture wash-1:4 Calendula tincture:distilled water. Alternate with Hypericum tincture wash 1:4 (tincture:distilled water) applied to wound site.

Topical treatments: hydrogen peroxide, diluted grapefruit seed extract can be taken internally as well as externally applied. Calendula tincture (1part MT to 1part distilled water).  This can be alternated with Hypericum MT, diluted and applied to wound site.

remedies.condition: Nightmares, Night Terrors   - Nightmares and night terrors usually happen between the first and second hour of sleep and are a common reaction to an emotional shock or trauma involving fear or violence.  For acute nightmares manifesting after a traumatic event homeopaths recommended:
remedies: Sulphur 30c For awakening frequently, with the slightest noise causing the person to suddenly become wide awake, inability to sleep between 2 and 5 am, twitchiness and jerking while asleep, talking in sleep and vivid nightmares.
Stramonium 30c For the person who wakes terrified and screaming and experiences insomnia despite sleepiness, with an aversion to darkness and being alone.

Chamomilla 30c For restlessness, fractiousness, asking for something and then pushing it away, children wanting to be carried around, whining , moaning, complaining and great sensitivity to every pain.
Ignatia amara 30c For long-lasting nightmares from emotional stress, hysteria, rapidly changing moods, introspection, yawning, sighing and sobbing.

Kali bromatum 30c For depression, melancholia, seeming delusional during night terrors, guilty feelings, restlessness and fidgeting with a need to move around and feelings that others are conspiring against him.
Aconitum 30c For fear, anxiety, physical and mental restlessness, tossing about in sleep, conviction that disaster is looming, all kinds of phobia, earaches and aversion to music.
Phosphorus 30c For vivid nightmares, dreams of fire, fear of ghosts and monsters, vivid imagination, clairvoyance, great sensitivity to external impressions, restlessness and fidgeting.

Arnica montana 30c For the person who claims to be okay during the day but has nightmares, awakes suddenly at night clutching the chest, fears sudden death and fear of being hit by oncoming traffic or any object moving toward him.
Aurum Bromatum 30C - for night terrors with somnambulism, migraines, fainting and coldness.

Calcarea carbonica 30c For anxiety and apprehension, escalating towards evening, fears about going crazy, forgetfulness and confusion, melancholia, heart palpitations, insomnia from anxious thoughts, frightening visions, seeing monsters or intruders in the room, startling at every noise; waking frequently during the night and dreaming of dead people.

Cina 30c For grinding of the teeth at night, irritability and violent jerking of hands and feet with convulsions and screaming.  The person gets on hands and knees while asleep and cries out and talks during sleep.
Paeonia officinalis 30c For terrifying nightmares and nervousness
Nux vomica 30c For the person who fears going to sleep because of wild dreams, who is haunted by memories of nightmares and experiences great aversion to noise and who is nervous and irritable.
Anacardium 30c For vivid, disgusting and terrifying dreams of death and danger.

remedies.condition: Panic Attacks  - Hysteria, Panic Attacks            Hysteria is an outdated term no longer used as a medical diagnosis, but it is a term one will often come across in older homeopathy books.  The term “hysteria” although somewhat vague and broad, generally described a loss of self control due to extreme emotion or threat and included behaviours such as hyperventilation, pounding heart, shaking or convulsions, dizziness and faintness, screaming, crying spells and panic.  It was also used to describe delusions and psychosomatic aches and pains or even paralysis that has no physical explanation.   Panic attacks are a type of hysterical response by the body to emotional stress.  The physical symptoms generally last 10 minutes or more, feel much like a heart attack and are accompanied by extreme anxiety, fear and feelings of impending disaster or loss of control.  Physical symptoms include a pounding, racing heartbeat, chest or stomach pain, breathing difficulty, sweating weakness, dizziness, chills and numbness.  Panic attacks can lead to complications such as agoraphobia, when sufferers begin avoiding activities in fear of experiencing another attack, substance abuse, depression or suicidal thoughts and loss of relationships or employment.   Choose one of the following remedies and administer one dose every 10-15 minutes as needed based upon severity.  As the person’s symptoms diminish in intensity, reduce the frequency of dosage to once every 1-4 hours.  Stop as soon as improvement is seen.
remedies: Aconitum napellus 30c For sudden onset, panic attacks resulting from shock, extreme restlessness and agitation, fears that death or disaster is imminent, flushed face, hyperventilation, heart palpitations, feelings of numbness or pins and needles, panic upon going to sleep, claustrophobia, agoraphobia, aversion to being left alone, fear of the dark and all kinds of irrational fears.

Ignatia 30c For sobbing, crying, rapidly changing moods, hyperventilation or sighing, twitching and convulsions, stabbing headaches, unpredictable, irrational behavior, defensiveness, resistance to comforting and reassurances, anxiety due to grief, loss, criticism, disappointment or loneliness, cramps in the back or abdomen, chest constriction and feeling as though choking.

Lachesis 30c  For fainting from fear or grief, after a pain in the heart, aversion to closed or crowded rooms, asthma, vertigo, nausea, vomiting, pale face, cold sweat, spasms,stiffness, hyster and over excitement.  The person feels worse after sleep.
Stramonium 30c For hysteria following terror, such as violent attack or rape, panic attacks at night, great fear, terrible nightmares and fear of the dark and of being alone.
Opium 30c For fainting from fear, twitching of limbs and hysterical fits with red face and sweating.  The person is withdrawn and slow to respond, with a dazed, confused, drugged-looking expression.

Chamomilla 30c For dizziness, dimmed vision, queasiness in the pit of the stomach, hot perspiring forehead, fainting from severe pain, anger, hysteria or sudden emotion, irritability, intolerance and impatience.  The person feels worse from heat, anger, fresh air and drafts and better from being carried.

Arsenicum album 30c For panic attacks withhypochondria.  Symptoms include an aversion to being alone, fastidiousness and a need to be in control, obsession over small details, restlessness despite exhaustion, asthma, digestive problems and panic attacks in the middle of the night or early morning.

Argentum nitricum 30c For a hurried feeling with anxiety, self-destructive thoughts or impulses, obsessive/compulsive superstitions, anticipatory anxiety, fear of heights, flying and crowds, claustrophobia, fear of failure and of losing control, diarrhea, dizziness and cravings for salt or sweets.  After a panic attack, this person may develop irrational fears and avoids any situation that corresponded with a previous attack.  The person feels better from cool, fresh air.

Gelsemium 30c For fear that the heart might stop, anticipatory nervousness and anxiety, stage fright, paralyzed by fear, weakness and trembling, headaches, chills, perspiration, diarrhea and fear of crowds or falling.

Phosphorus 30c Use for the person with an exaggerated startle response. Other symptoms include excitability, intense and vivid fears, extreme anxiety triggered by thoughts, flushed face, heart palpitations, great thirst, desire for cold foods and drinks and sensitivity to sounds and odors.  The person desires company and reassurance and feels better from talking about his problems or from massage.

remedies.condition: Panic Attacks  - Hysteria, Panic Attacks Continued:
remedies: Silicea 30c For temporary loss of confidence with anxiety and shyness, fear of speaking in public or being interviewed, evaluated or tested, exhaustion, headaches with difficulty concentrating, oversensitivity and dread and lack of stamina and vitality.
Natrum muriaticum 30c For chest pains, avoiding company, brooding, refusing consolation or sympathy but will give consolation to others, insomnia and nighttime fears, claustrophobia and migraines.

Calcarea carbonica 30c For fear of change, fear of losing control or of going insane, stubborn adherence to routing and need for stability, muddled and confused thinking that exacerbates anxiety, agitation from worry, nagging dread of disaster, easily fatigued, sweaty, fear of heights, insects and dogs and claustrophobia.  The person feels chilly and sluggish and craves sweets.

Kali arsenicosum 30c For panic attacks with worry about health, especially heart disease or heart attack, insomnia or aversion to sleep due to nighttime anxiety, exhaustion, irritability, chilliness and hallucinations of ghosts.

Nux moschata 30c For dry mouth and throat, heart palpitations, memory loss, absentmindedness, errors of perception, objects seem larger than they are, drowsiness, faintness, loss of emotion and sensation, changeable moods and the head rolls and drops onto the chest as if very heavy.

Moschus 30c For hysteria, convulsions and nervous trembling, catalepsy, vertigo with a sensation of falling from a great height, compulsive laughter, weak pulse and one cheek pale and cold while the other is hot and red.  The person feels worse from cold and better from rubbing or open air.
Spongia 30c For anxiety and difficulty breathing accompanying fear of death or of something terrible that might happen.

Cuprum metallicum 30c For fear with difficulty breathing and outrage due to injustice, cruelty or abuse.  The person is introverted and unsociable with angry outbursts, cramps, convulsions, vomiting and spasms.  The person feels better from drinking cold water.

remedies.condition: Poisoning, Central Nervous System Disturbance: Symptoms include headache, hyperactivity, great excitement, mental confusion, depression, delirium, dazed appearance and coma.    Choose one and give e10-30min.
remedies: Arsenicum album 30c - For any poison, including toxic chemical attacks, causing collapse, weakness, exhaustion, fear, anxiety, and perhaps diarrhea. Arsenicum is your first line of defense against any toxin or poisonous exposure.
Nitricum acidum 30c - For mercury poisoning and panic attacks, severe and persistent thoughts of death, irritability, sticking pains in the body and headache made worse by noise or pressure.
Opium 30c - delirious or unconscious, breath comes in rattlings gasps, upper body is beaded with sweat. Dissolve 4 pellets in 4 oz water and rub the remedy on the inner wrist.

Tarantula hispanica 30c - extreme restlessness and hyperactivity, a compulsion to walk even though condition is worsened by walking, twitching and jerking of the arms and legs and sensation of ants crawling over the skin.
Sulphur 30c - Mercury poisoning, mental confusion, headache, rashes, abdominal pain, trouble sleeping, excessive perspiration and offensive body odor. Sulphur is also helpful for vaccine reactions.

Carbo vegetabilis 30c - person who has fainted or collapsed or on the verge. Skin is bluish, person may be gasping for air, seem to be in a near-death state, may feel cold to the touch or in a cold sweat. Carbo veg has a reputation for turning around even the most serious cases of collapse. It is also helpful for breathing difficulty of any kind.

Laurocerasus 30c - another emergency situation, person has collapsed and gasping for air, turning blue and becoming cold, perhaps hand up at the throat or heart. May be going into heart or respiratory failure and may be unresponsive.

Glonoinum 30c - For person who is weak, dizzy and confused and has a throbbing headache. May not recognize familiar locations, may have convulsions and feels better lying down on the left side. (note, aconite will antidote glonoinum)

remedies.condition: Poisoning - Circulatory Disturbance: Symptoms include rapid heartbeat, low and dropping blood pressure, weakness and perspiration with cold clammy skin. Stop when improvement is seen or if the condition is not resolved, continue with greater frequency between doses.
remedies: Digitalis 30c, e15min - heart palpitations, a weak, irregular and/or slow pulse rate, pale or dusky skin tone, faint or dizzy, short of breath, nausea, yellow vision and anxiety, feels better in fresh air.

remedies.condition: Poisoning,Gastrointestinal Disturbance: Symptoms include vomiting, diarrhea, cramping, difficulty speaking and swallowing and irritation of the mucus membranes of the lining of the stomach and mouth.  Choose one of the following remedies and administer one dose every 10-30min up to 6 doses.  Stop when improvement is seen or if the condition is not resolved, continue with greater frequency between doses.
remedies: Arsenicum album 30c - burning pains in digestive tract, overall coldness of body and anxiety and restlessness. Extreme fatigue, exhausted after small exertion, may have headache,  thirsty but can only tolerate small sips of water.
Kali phos 6x, can be coupled with Arsenicum. 1 dose every 30c, minutes, decreasing with improvement.
Belladonna 30c - “burning” is key. Burning sensation along with vomiting or diarrhea, coupled with red face, anxiety, thirst or restlessness.
Alternate Belladonna 30c with Arsenicum 30c e15-30c, minutes. Increase time between as symptoms improve.
Formica Rufa 30c - for redness, burning and itching of the eyes, throat and mouth. May also have burning pain and pressure in the stomach, nausea and headache.

Ipecac 30C - worst and most extreme nausea possible indicates need for ipecac. Symptoms are relentless, vomiting brings no relief. The person is not very ill except for perhaps a fever and some weakness, but the vomiting is nearly non-stop. May have pains in abdomen, lots of gas, and green stool.
Nux Vomica 30c - For nausea and vomiting, abd. pain improved with holding stomach, and diarrhea. May also be cranky, have vertigo and headache.
Phosphorus 30c - Lots of vomiting with diarrhea, involuntary passage of stool, restlessness and desire for cold drinks such as ice water or sparkling drinks. Smallest ingestion induces vomiting.

Veratrum Album 30c - For violent and voluminous diarrhea with vomiting that may be simultaneous. Stools are greenish and watery. Abdominal cramping may be relieved by diarrhea. Worse with motion, walking can bring on wave of nausea or vomiting. Person is chilly, weak and very thirsty for cold water.

remedies.condition: Poisoning, Inhaled poisons   (Includes carbon monoxide, chlorine and airborne farming chemicals.)   Symptoms include extreme respiratory irritation, fluid in the lungs, swelling that blocks breathing, eye irritation, throat spasms, coughing/choking, vomiting and turning blue.  Choose one and give e15min.
remedies: Arsenicum Album 30C - for pesticides and chemical exposure such as chlorine. Administer one dose of Arsenicum e15min and alternate with Carbolicum Acidum 30C e15min. Add Opium 30C in aqueous form, e5min on the inside of the wrist while administering CPR.

Belladonna 30C - for carbon monoxide poisoning when the person is semi-conscious, has low respiration or has stopped breathing, is unconscious or has seizures. If person is unable to completely open eyelids and displays coordination problems, poor judgment, neurological irritability and/or a confused mental state, alternate Gelsemium with Belladonna until symptoms subsides. Then lengthen time between doses.
Bovista 30C - For suffocation from gas fumes and tar and coal fumes.

Carbo vegetabilis 30C - Carbon monoxide poisoning, lack of oxygen, shortness of breath and unconsciousness. If unconscious, apply an aqueous solutio to the inside of wrist, e10-60min (depending on severity), until improvement is seen, up to 10 doses. Add the cell salt Kali Phos 6x e3-4hours until improvement is seen, up to 4 days.
Carbolicum acidum 30C - For chlorine and carbon monoxide inhalation, this remedy addresses systemic reactions of a more serious nature, such as anaphylactic shock. Remedy is difficult to procure.
Gelsemium 30C - For weakness and flu-like symptoms from carbon monoxide poisoning.
Nux vomica 30c - Use to quell the body’s reaction to any toxic substance.

Natrum muriaticum 30C - smoke inhalation and general exposure to polluted environments. Can be used prophylactically. One dose Nat Mur 6x dissolved in water and sipped every few minutes can provide protection from respiratory discomfort in polluted environments.
Opium 30C - Carbon monoxide poisoning, administer aqueous solution to the wrist every 5 minutes if the person is in a coma and CPR is not helping. Continue CPR and rub remedy on wrist.

Sulphuric Acid 30c - For shortness of breath and other respiratory symptoms, trouble breathing, rapid respiration with nostrils flared, larynx moving up and down violently and a quick hack of a cough.

remedies.condition: PTSD--Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder  -  PTSD is a diagnostic term used to describe an ongoing stress reaction that lingers months or even years after extreme trauma.  Symptoms include severe anxiety, worry and stress, nightmares and insomnia, emotional numbness and avoidance of feeling, self-medication with alcohol or drugs as a way to ‘escape,’ loss of interest in relationships, career or social activities, loss of ambition, persistent episodes of reliving the traumatic event in memory (aka ‘flashbacks’), repetitive thoughts, panic attacks, depression and fatigue, lack of confidence or trust, hopelessness, difficulty concentrating, exaggerated startle reaction and angry, irritable or even violent behavior.  PTSD may begin with symptoms of Acute Stress Reaction soon after a crisis, and then become chronic if the acute phase is not resolved.  It may also develop long after a crisis, among those who never exhibited acute symptoms.
remedies: [BP] For Depression:  Aurum Metallicum 200c every other day, Coffea Cruda 200c, 2D
[BP] For all emotional and mental issues: Ignatia 200c, 2D
Administer 2 doses every day, up to six doses and then reassess.  Stop if there has been improvement or move to another remedy if no improvement has been seen.
Ignatia 30c This should be the first remedy chosen to address any emotional shock or grief, whether recent or in the past.
Natrum Mur30c For  those who bottle up their emotions and have trouble opening up and confiding their feelings to others.  Hallmarks include brooding and dwelling on unhappy events.
Aconitum 30c Use for recurring panic attacks, heart palpitations, shortness of breath and fear of death.
Arnica Montana 30c For depression after a traumatic event or physical injury not yet treated by Arnica, even if in the past.  The person tends to deny that anything is wrong with him.
Staphysagria 30c For fear, feelings of powerlessness, inability to stand up for oneself, emotional deadness or suppressed anger that eventually erupts in rage.
Stramonium 30c For anxiety after a violent traumatic event, fear, night terrors, nightmares, insomnia and fear of the dark.

Aurum Metallicum 30c For depression, loss of interest in life after a traumatic event or financial loss, lack of purpose, joylessness, emptiness and despair, suicidal feelings, guilt and regret, moaning or crying out in sleep, pain both physical and emotional, aversion to company, strong sense of duty and responsibility, feelings of failure, bone pain and heat problems.  The person feels worse at night and better from walking in the open air.

Arsenicum Album 30c For insecurity, anxiety, restlessness, fussiness, irritability and discontent.  The person is overly dependent on others, fears being alone and is not easily reassured, is fastidious and worries about his own health and finances.  Other symptoms include panic attacks, overwhelming anxiety when things are out of order or overly messy, fear of germs or clutter sleeplessness from anxiety and chilliness.

Sepia 30c For indifference to loved ones, lack of energy such that everything becomes too much of an effort, joylessness and aversion to company but fear of being alone. The person is irritable or silent and weepy, is averse to being comforted and craves chocolate and sour or acidic foods.

Carcinosin 30c For depression and exhaustion from having taken on too much in order to help others or from hearing about the problems of others.  The person has a strong sense of care for others, is easily hurt by criticism and experiences feelings of guilt.

Phosphorus 30c For depression with a loss of interest in life, as though the joy has gone out of life, spaciness, memory loss, inability to think of the right word, insomnia with drowsiness in the day and oversensitivity.
Mancinella 30c For the person who feels as though he is under the control of someone or something for obsessive compulsive behaviors, and for adolescents and abused women.
Chamomilla 30c For hyper-vigilance, hypersensitivity, oversensitivity to noise and music, fractiousness and for children who suffer with stomach aches after trauma.

Cocculus 30c For the person who experiences excessive worry about loved ones, insomnia from worry, feeling as if everything is in slow motion and a feeling of unreality, anxiety and confusion.  The person is worn out from caring for others.
Kali Bromatum 30c For great anguish, survivor guilt after witnessing harm come to others and feeling helpless, nervous, restlessness, inability to forgive oneself and obsessive/compulsive tendencies.

Helleborus 30c For the person who feels emotionally dead.  Symptoms include lack of love, indifference, sighing, apathy; picking at clothes, lips or skin, answers as though distracted, poor memory, delusions of dead people, aversion to company, weakness and paralysis.  The person feels better when alone.
Ambra grisea 30c For total indifference towards everyone and everything, no matter how heart wrenching.
Fluoric acid 30cFor the person who is indifferent towards loved ones, but friendly and enthusiastic with strangers.

Cuprum metallicaum 30c For the person who experiences fear and outrage due to injustice, cruelty or abuse.  The person becomes introverted and unsociable.  Other symptoms include cramps, spasms, convulsions, muscle tension, cramps in the toes, vomiting and spasms.  The person feels better from drinking cold water, is exhausted from constant stress and lacks confidence.  Powerful feelings are repressed through rigid control, and the person becomes humorless, rigid and cold, withdrawn, critical and domineering with periodic unpredictable outbursts of violent emotions.  This person hates to be dependent on others.

Mercurius solubilis 30c For anxiety that arises after suffering some kind of abuse or trauma, with fears it will happen again, a feeling of being on edge or “walking on eggshells”, expecting something bad to happen to him, fears about saying or doing the wrong thing fear of being alone, fear of the dark, fear of being followed, stammering, convulsions or tremors and intense physical pains with sudden onset.

Kali Iodatum 3x-for suspected exposure to constant low-level radioactive iodine, 1 dose 3 times per day to address any long-term effects of such exposure.

Cadmium sulph 30c or potassium iodide 30c- Can be taken once before and after exposure to radiation.  These remedies are generally used as a prophylaxis before symptoms appear, but they can be used after as well to ease the symptoms appear, but they can be used after as well to ease the symptoms of radiation sickness.

Cadmium sulph 30c-   This is the go-to remedy for the person who has violent nausea, retching and constant and unremitting repetitive vomiting (which may be black). The person is exhausted from vomiting has lost weight and hair and feels very cold.  This remedy helps lift the spirits as well as supporting healing in the body.  Cad Sulph may cause the person to vomit after taking the remedy, but this is likely to make the person feel much better afterwards.  This remedy is helpful for interrupting a cycle of persisten vomiting and allowing the person to hold down food so they can get their strength back.
Sol 30c- This remedy is for the person who is emaciated and whose hair is falling out in clumps.  Try this remedy and if you have tried Cadmium sulphuricum, but it has not had an effect.

Cobaltum 30- This remedy has been known to remove the ill effects of radiation when taken four times in one day for 2-3 days and combined with Nat mur 6x at least three times a day or more if necessary. If needed from that point forward, it is generally used fourtimes in one day every two weeks for 2-3 months. In the hands of a skilled homeopaty this remedy may be used in 200c.

Radium bromatum 30c-This remedy has been used for skin eruptions or ulcers from radiation burns.  Generally, use twice daily if the burns are mild and up to 5 times per day if they are more severe.  It has been used for many weeks but always under the watchful eye of a skilled homeopath.

X-Ray 30c- Is a common remedy for radiation burns and other skin conditions after radiation exposure.  Research suggests X-ray also minimizes genetic damage after exposure to radiation under medical or dental care or in the upper atmosphere while flying.
Rhus venenata 30c-For radiation burns with extreme itching and large blisters, this remedy can be taken three times per day.  Watch carefully for improvement.
Cadmium iodatum 30c- For unexpected exposure to radiation, without the chance to take Kali Iodatum to protect the thyroid gland.

Ceanothus 30c-This remedy provides specific protection and support the spleen.  The patient will have discomfort and pain up the left side of the body and intense indigestion and diarrhea.  This remedy also helps with lung irritation and bronchitis with copious secreations.  Spleen damage interferes with platelet production in the blood, so also look for easy bruising and reduced ability of the blood clot.  This person also has increased susceptibility to disease.
Arsenicum album 30c- The premiere antidote to poisoning is used after radiation exposure in repeated doses every few minutes to half an hour for 1-2 days, then as needed depending on the symptoms.
Phosphorus 30c, 200c, and 1M are taken one after the other in the same fashion as Arsenicum. Together, these remedies have a history of being a very useful first aid for radiation sickness.

Ipecauanha 30c, Addresses any situation with constant and unremitting nausea, profuse saliva, vomiting of white, glairy (slimy) mucus in large quantities, without relief of the nausea.  The very thought of food makes this person queasy.  The person feels sleepy after vomiting, and any motion makes the nausea much worse.

Nux Vomica 30c- Addresses constant nausea with vomiting, especially in the morning, and that horrible feeling of "If only I could vomit I would feel so much better." This person feels a deep pressure in teh stomach and has a frequent but unsuccessful desire to empty their colon.  This person is sensitive to touch, noise, anger, spices and narcotic drugs, any of which will make them feel much worse. They feel worse in morning and after any type of mental work requiring concentration.  The feel better in the evening, while lying down to rest, and in damp, wet weather.

Tabacum 30c- This remedy has been used to address incessant nausea that makes the person feels seasick. This person vomits upon the slightest motion and may break into a cold sweat and feel faint from teh violence of the vomiting.  He may also experience bouts of sudden urgent diarrhea that is yellowish, slimy or watery. Tabacum symptoms come in waves, with times of intense vomiting and diarrhea followed by a blessed respite period before the next wave hits.  This person feels better from open, fresh , cool air and will likely throw the bedclothes off because he cannot tolerate having the body covered.

Phosphoricum acidum 30c- For the person who is just worn out from the acute phase of any disease.  This person is apathetic and confused and may want to give up.  He will experience nausea and diarrhea, headache, dry cracked lips and bleeding gums.  He may experience difficult respiration with a dry, unproductive cough and a constant urge to cough that brings no relieve from the tickle in the chest. Look for an irregular pulse and listen for complaints of joint pain and cramping in the arms or wrists.  This person wants to be left alone and may resent being talked to.  He will feel better if kept warm and positioned to allow circulation of body fluids.

Phosphorus 30c- Is ideal for the person who is completely weak and weary from loss of vital fluids.  The person feels so tired and apathetic, it is difficult to even react to what is going on around him.  The person may say he is tired of trying anymore but is also worried about what will happen if he really does give up.  Look for hair falling out in single spots and hollow and sunken eyes surrounded by blue circles with puffy lids.  The person may vomit in spurts, a little bit at a time, rather than bringing up all of the stomach contents at once. He may vary between straining and unproductive constipation and watery diarrhea that flows as if from a faucet.  Look for this person to feel worse in the evening (before midnight), from lying on their left or painful side, or when the weather changes and feel better in the dark and from lying on the right side.  Hot food and drinks make the person feel worse.

remedies.condition: Rocky Mountain Spotted Fever - Usually carried by wood ticks in the Western States and dog ticks or Lone-star ticks in the East and South.  Generally appears between May and September.  Symptoms appear approximately a week after being bitten and can be deadly.  It takes 18 hours for a tick to transmit the disease through a bite so it is important to locate and remove ticks with tweezers as soon as possible.  The bacteria reside in the body so there is no need to worry if the head remains in the skin at first. Save the tick in a sealed jar, use latex or rubber gloves and avoid touching the tick directly.  Because the bites are painless, be diligent in examining the skin, especially warm moist areas and areas covered by hair, such as the scalp.  The onset of this disease is very sudden and symtoms include headache, chills, high fever that can last for up to two weeks, muscle soreness, nausea, skin rash, delirium and heart attack.  After removing the tick disinfect the bite area.  See a doctor immediately if possible.
