Oenanthe Crocata 30c For total and sudden loss of consciousness, frothing at the mouth, clenched jaws, swollen livid complexion, fixed eyes with dilated pupils, cold extremities, seizures during pregnancy, spasmodic, noisy and labored breathing and the head and spine arched backward.

Artemisia Absinthium 30c - For an aura that includes vertigo, speech difficulty, a feeling of warmth rising from the stomach, nervous shaking before the attack, sleeplessness, kleptomania, hallucinations, and memory loss.

Silicea 30c for an aura that begins with a feeling of coldness, especially on the left side, and a sensation in the solar plexus, seizures brought on after mental or emotional strain, constipation, sweaty clammy palms, unhealthy skin, seizures followed by warm sweat, nervous exhaustion and vaccine-induced seizures.

remedies.condition: Seizure continued - Following a seizure, the person may experience confusion, headache, fatigue, sore muscles or unusual sensations and should not be left alone. Seek emergency medical services if seizure lasts longer than 5 mins or if person experiences multiple seizures in a short amount of time or if person has never had a seizure before. Seek out emergency medical services if the person remains unconscious or exhibits abnormal behavior after the seizure has stopped, if the seizure occurred in water or if the person is pregnant, injured or has diabetes.
remedies: Nux Vomica 30c For an aura that begins in the solar plexus with a sensation of insects crawling on the face (formication), where the person retains consciousness, involuntary urination and defecation during seizure, falling into a deep sleep after the seizure, great rigidity and redness of face.  The person feels worse from anger or other strong emotions and from touch, movement, indigestion and in open air.

Plumbum 30c For seizures preceded by a sensation of heaviness in the legs, seizures followed by paralysis, seizures from sclerosis or brain tumors, slow return of consciousness, severe constipation and abdominal pains and snoring.

Cicuta Virosa 30c For an aura with a strange sensation in the head, sudden rigidity followed by jerking convulsions with violent distortions and then followed by severe weakness and exhaustion, difficulty breathing, lockjaw, dark reddish face, frothing at the mouth, rigidity with arched back, fixed staring eyes, trembling before and after the seizure, head thrown back and to the side and seizures from concussions.

Hyoscyamus 30c For seizures from violent fright or preceded by great hunger, a great deal of twitching and jerking movements, frothing at the mouth, biting of the tongue, hysterical convulsions, visual and auditory illusions and involuntary facial movements, both before and after the seizure.
Stramonium 30c For seizure from fright, sudden loss of consciousness, head that jerks to the right, rotating left arm movements, fear of dark, aversion to being alone and trembling from fear.

Agaricus Muscarius 30c For the person whose mind is very active after the seizure with many ideas and great talkativeness and involuntary hyperactivity of the muscles with shivering, shaking and jumpiness but a return to calm during sleep.

Calcarea Carbonica 30c For flabbiness, sweaty head and neck, vertigo, brooding and melancholy, fretfulness and irritability, anxiety and apprehension, weak memory, an aura that begins in the solar plexus and sweeps up or else down into the abdomen and limbs with a feeling as if a mouse were running up the arm, loss of consciousness and seizures caused by fright.

Causticum 30c for menstrual irregularities, seizures that occur during puberty, involuntary urination, and petite mal seizures that occur in open air. The person feels worse during the new moon and feels better after drinking cold water.

Bufo Rana 30c For seizures from fright or at night, an aura that begins in the abdomen or genitals, a sensation of anxiety in the abdominal area, seizures during coitus, extreme irritability and easy anger prior to seizure, incoherent talking, dilated pupils sensitive to light, a head that is drawn backwards with the jaw dropped open and involuntary urination after the attack.  The person feels worse in a warm room.

Kali Bromatum 30c For seizures during the new moon, attacks followed by headache, dullness, sleepiness and slowness of speech, vertigo, exceeding fidgetiness with twitching of the fingers and jerking of the hands and clumsy gait.  The person feels better from mental or physical occupation.

Indigo 30c For extreme low spirits, hot flashes rising from the abdomen to the head, a desire to keep busy, vertigo, nausea, a head that feels frozen and a painful aura sensation between the shoulders.  The person feels worse from rest and feels better from motion and pressure or rubbing.

Physiological Shock is divided into various types, depending on cause.

remedies.condition: Metabolic shock occurs due to loss of fluids from the body due to vomiting, diarrhea, blood loss or excessive urination, as seen in some types of flu or severe cases of food poisoning.  Generally this is treated by rehydrating with electrolyte solutions, intravenous fluid and/or blood transfusion. (See Dehydration)
remedies: External hemorrhage - Apply Calendula or Hypericum tincture (diluted 1:10- 1 tsp per quart of water) directly on the wound to help stop the bleeding
Ferrum Phos 30c - If the blood is bright red and gushing
Aconite 30c - if the patient is extremely restless and shows evidence of extreme fright and fear of death.

remedies.condition: Neurogenic shock occurs as a result of spinal cord injuries that cause the nerves to lose control over the arteries ability to contract.  This results in the arteries becoming fully dilated and the blood pools below the injury site.  Generally it is treated by immobilization, anti-inflammatories and surgery.  (See Back injuries)
remedies: Hypericum 30c for faintness, nerve pain, inflammation, shooting pains, injury to the male genitals.
Arsenicum Album 30c for the person with moist skin and clammy with hot perspiration; they are cold but crave fresh air and want to be fanned; weak, sluggish, exhausted; indifferent and confused.
Arnica Montana 30c for the person with hot hands and cold body
Aconitum Napellus 30c for the person with hot hands but cold feet
Veratrum Album 30c for the person who is cold and clammy all over

remedies.condition: Septic Shock, or toxic shock syndrome, occurs in response to severe bacterial (or occasionally viral or fungal) infection that causes full body inflammation that disrupts blood flow to the organs and brain.  This can result in organ failure and a severe drop in blood pressure.  Symptoms include shaking, chills, sudden fever, flushed hot skin and rapid pulse.  This type of shock is usually treated with antibiotics and fluids. (See Tetanus/Blood poisoning/Sepsis)
remedies: Pyrogenium 30c if the person is loquacious, can think and talk faster than ever before and has burning pains.
Baptisia Tinctoria 30c If the person is gloomy, with an unhappy state of mind or heavy feeling, as if the person could not sit up.

remedies.condition: Remedies commonly used to address Physiological Shock
remedies: Opium 30c For person who is unconscious or semi-conscious, with hot, red, bloated, swollen, dark face, twitching or spasms, especially in the corners of the mouth, lower jaw hanging down, half closed bloodshot eyes, pupils contracted and unresponsive, painlessness and sluggishness.  Used for stroke or for those who have been strangled or hanged.

Carbo Vegetabilis 30c Known as the homeopathic “corpse reviver,” this remedy is used for near death states, when the person is in a state of collapse and is almost gone.  Symptoms include barely perceptible pulse, exhaustion with great weakness, chilliness, cold sweat, gasping for air, hot head, cold extremities, belching, flatulence and distension, excessive saliva, heart failure, puffy, bluish, cold face, blue or mottled skin, twitching of the upper lip, black, swollen tongue coated yellow-brown, rattling in the throat, pupils that do not react to light, fainting after rising from sleep while still in bed, fainting from dehydration, heart palpitations and sluggishness.  If the person is bleeding, the blood is dark red and oozing.  If the person is conscious, he may want to be fanned or want the windows open.  This remedy is used for carbon monoxide or coal gas poisoning.

Laurocerasus 30c For breathlessness, collapse, faintness, lack of reaction, gasping or suffocating, long lasting faint, symptoms brought on by fright, heart and/or respiratory failure, chilliness not helped by warmth, blue or mottled skin, appearance of being poisoned.  The person regains color very slowly and feels better from lying down.

Antimonium Tart 30c For paralysis of the lungs from fluid retention or drowning, rattling in the chest, breathlessness from objects caught in the throat or from mucus in the airway, cold, blue, pale face covered with cold sweat and newborn infants who do not breathe.

Arnica Montana 30c, For asphyxia of traumatic origin, physical injuries and sunken face with droopy eyes.  The person is seemingly unconscious but answers questions coherently and then relapses, is averse to touching and company, and asks to be left alone.  This remedy is also used for people who say they are fine when they are obviously injured and in shock.

Camphora 30c For collapse with icy coldness of the entire body, weak pulse and haggard red or bluish pale and faint upon rising and experiences photophobia if conscious.  This person has fixed, staring eyes with dilated pupils, and feels aversion to being covered, feels better from thinking about the symptoms and feels worse from motion.

China 30c For apparent death from bleeding, a sallow, bloodless, pale bloated face, weakness and decreased levels of consciousness, dehydration from loss of fluids, dizziness when walking and feelings of indifference, apathy and despondence.
Lachesis 30c For apparent death, with no breathing and hardly and pulse, vertigo, pale face, nausea, vomiting, stitching pains around the heart, cold sweat, spasms, stiffening and swelling.

remedies.condition: Remedies commonly used to address Physiological Shock
remedies: If the person is breathing, choose from the remedies above or below based on the symptoms.  Administer one dose every 10-30 minutes as needed, based upon severity.  As the person’s symptoms diminish in intensity, reduce the frequency of dosage to once every 1-4 hours.  Stop as soon as improvement is seen.

Aconitum Napellus 30c For severe anxiety or terror and fear of death, extreme restlessness and tossing about, aversion to light, red eyes, hot, red, flushed and swollen face, becoming very pale and faint upon rising, chest pain, convulsions, violent palpitation of the heart, buzzing in the ears and fainting from fright.
Ipecac 30c Use for severe nausea and vomiting or fainting from loss of blood or vital fluids.  The person feels worse when lying down.
Veratrum Album 30c For acute diarrhea where the electrolytes are unstable, icy cold and shivering but also sweating and shock following vomiting, diarrhea or blood loss.
Cocculus 30c For exhaustion from caring for others or from lack of sleep, jet lag, motion sickness, nausea and vertigo.  The person feels worse from eating, open air, touch or noise.

Digitalis 30c For cardiogenic shock, fainting preceded by vertigo and dimming of vision, very slow pulse and nausea.  The person’s head feels heavy.  This person feels worse from sitting up, from eating and from music and feels better from fasting and open air.

Moschus 30c For fainting accompanied by pulmonary spasms and headache, hysteria, convulsions and nervous trembling, unconscienceness with rigidity of the body (catalepsy), vertigo with a sensation of falling from a great height, compulsive laughter and weak pulse.  The person feels worse from cold and better from rubbing or open air.

Nux Moschata 30c For a strong tendency to fainting, heart failure, irresistible drowsiness, unconsciousness, staggering walk, cold hands and feet, dry skin and crying with a feeling of bewilderment making the person feels as if in a dream.  The person feels worse from motion or from being bumped or jarred.

Nux Vomica 30c For fainting after a meal, when pregnant, when worn out by mental labor or from drunkenness or drug abuse, nausea, pale face, vision problems, stomach pains, trembling, great debility and restlessness.  The person feels better from sleeping and strong pressure.

Tabacum 30c For fainting with weakness, nausea, paleness, cold sweat, dilated pupils and trembling limbs, weak intermittent pulse, vertigo and confusion of mind.  The person feels worse when opening the eyes and from extremes of temperature and feels better from being uncovered and from fresh air.

remedies.condition: Shock - Collapse, Fainting, Unconsciousness due to a fall in blood pressure (Syncope), Coma
remedies: Shock and collapse are similar, if not the same issue.  Fainting results from a temporary shortage of oxygen to the brain, generally due to a drop in blood pressure, and decrease in blood flow to the brain.  Fainting is a common symptom of shock.  Stressors, such as illness, injury, pain, fatigue, heat dehydration, anemia, intense emotions, hyperventilation, pregnancy, exercise, low blood sugar or standing in one place for too long, can all result in momentary loss of consciousness, which is resolved as soon as oxygen and blood flow to the brain are restored.  Physical collapse generally results in a prone position, which puts the head on the same level as the heart.  Fainting is the body’s attempt to pump blood more easily and efficiently by getting the person to lie down so the heart does not have to work against gravity.

Although there is usually little warning before a collapse, it may be preceded by yawning , ringing in the ears, sudden cold perspiration, rapid and deep breathing, nausea, confusion or blurred vision.  Anyone experiencing sudden weakness or dizziness should sit or lie down immediately to prevent injury.

Although a faint usually does not last very long, weakness and confusion may last for 15 to 30c, minutes after regaining consciousness.  Do not let a person get up quickly after a faint.  He should remain sitting quietly for some time until feeling stronger and more alert.

During a faint, treat the person for shock.  The following remedies are commonly used when fainting is the primary symptom.  Choose one remedy and administer 1 dose every 5 to 15 minutes as needed based upon severity.  When the person receiving the remedy is unconscious, use of an aqueous solution rubbed on the inner wrist or behind the ear is recommended. As the person’s symptoms diminish in intensity, reduce the frequency of dosage to once every 1 - 4 hours. Stop as soon as improvement is seen.

Ignatia 30c For fainting following emotional shock or fright, before menses, from being in a close, crowded space or from hysteria, grief, and worry.  The person may feel a strong aversion to tobacco smoke and will feel worse in the morning, from open air, from eating and from coffee.

Veratrum 30c For spasms, convulsive movements, especially of the eyes and eyelids, lockjaw, cold sweats, extremely cold, blue skin with great weakness and delirium, especially thinking that something bad will happen.  The person feels worse from cold wet weather and better from warmth and walking.

Aconitum Napellus 30c For fainting from fright, buzzing in the ears, violent heart palpitations, vertigo and fainting upon rising, chills and pale gray face following flushing.  The person feels worse from shaking the head.

Champhora30c Use for the person with icy cold skin but who wants to be uncovered, even throwing off blankets while unconscious.  Other symptoms include sudden collapse, red face while lying down that goes pale upon rising, feeling of impending death and vertigo.  The person feels worse from motion, touch and cold air.

remedies.condition: Shock - Collapse, Fainting, Unconsciousness due to fall in blood pressure (Syncope), Coma
remedies: Carbo Vegetablis 30c For fainting with great weakness and from the slightest exertion.  The person desires movement of air and wants to be fanned.  Other symptoms include severe cold, especially the knees or breath, fainting upon waking or rising from bed or from dehydration and fear of the dark.  The person feels worse from cold and damp.

Chamomilla 30c For fainting from pain or sudden emotion, dizziness, dim vision, squeamishness in the pit of the stomach and hot sweaty forehead. The person is impatient, intolerant of being spoken to and snappish.  The person feels worse from heat, anger, open air, wind and night and feels better from being carried.

China 30c For collapse and weakness from loss of fluids, apathy, indifference, depression, vertigo when walking, anemia, diarrhea, distended gassy abdomen, night sweats, headaches, and extremely sensitive skin.  The person feels worse from even a light draft of air, noise, touch or fruit and feels hungry at night.

Cocculus 30c For collapse from exhaustion or lack of sleep, fainting from motion sickness, vertigo or jet lag, nausea or car sickness.  The person feels worse from eating, open air, tobacco, motion or being jarred, touched, noise, emotional disturbances and being tired.  Also for sudden loss of consciousness for no apparent reason.

Coffea 30c For fainting from fright that is not relieved by Ignatia or Aconitum 30c, great sensitivity or over excitement with great mental and physical hyperactivity.  The person feels worse from sudden emotions, strong odors and narcotics.

Digitalis 30c For fainting following dimming of vision and vertigo.  The head feels heavy and the person feels as though falling backward.  Other symptoms include very slow pulse, nausea and heart problems.  The person feels worse when sitting up, from eating and from music and feels better when fasting and in open air.
Hepar Sulph 30c For great sensitivity to pain, chilliness, extreme irritability and vertigo.  The person feels worse from cool air and better from warmth, food and being covered up.
Ipecac 30c For nausea and vomiting, collapse from loss of fluid or blood, profuse salivation and sleeping with eyes half open. The person feels worse in humid warm weather and from lying down.

Lachesis 30c For faints that appear death-like with imperceptible breathing and pulse, for women who have a tendency to faint, especially in closed stuffy rooms, fainting before or during menses, collapse after heart pains, fainting from grief or fear, vertigo with pale face, difficulty breathing, nausea, or vomiting, cold sweat, stiffness and swelling with spasms, hysteria and over excitement. The person feels worse after sleeping.

Laurocerasus 30c For death-like faints that last a long time, very pale bluish face that regains color slowly, cold skin, lack of reaction, fainting from heart weakness and sudden loss of consciousness for no apparent reason.

remedies.condition: Shock - Collapse, Fainting, Unconsciousness due to a fall in blood pressure (Syncope), Coma
remedies: Nux Vomica 30c For collapse in the morning, after a hearty meal or during pregnancy, nausea, pale face, dim vision, stomach pains and digestive upset, restlessness and fainting after abuse of alcohol or drugs.  The person feels worse from mental exertion, from eating especially spicy foods, from touch, from stimulants or narcotics and from any cold weather.  The person feels better from undisturbed sleep and from strong pressure applied to the body where it ails.

Opium 30c For extreme weakness and fainting with lack of vital reaction.  The person appears as though drugged, with drowsiness, stupor and painlessness, and is extremely sluggish and unresponsive to stimulus.  Red, bloodshot eyes are half closed, with pupils contracted and unresponsive.  The person feels worse from heat and sleep and better from walking and cold.

Phosphoric Acid 30c For fainting from nervous exhaustion, grief or mental shock, mental strain that leads to physical collapse, fainting after a meal, apathy and indifference.  The person feels worse from exertion, from being spoken to and from loss of fluids and feels better from warmth.

Pulsatilla 30c Especially used for those who faint in a closed or crowded room.  This person craves open air and wants the window open even when chilly and exhibits peevishness and weepiness.  The person feels better from cold drinks despite lack of thirst, from motion, from cold applications and cold food and feels worse from heat, rich foods and warm rooms.

Sulphur 30c For fainting in the late morning from hypoglycemia accompanied by a sinking feeling in the stomach, hot flushes, aversion to water and bathing, dry itchy skin, hot sweaty hands and burning feet.  This person wants the feet uncovered and craves fresh air.  Other symptoms include a feeling of suffocation and redness of the lips and face.  The person feels worse from standing.

Tabacum 30c For fainting accompanied by weakness, nausea and cold perspiration, extremely pale skin, dilated pupils, trembling, confusion, vertigo and intermittent weak pulse.  The person feels worse from opening the eyes and from temperature extremes and feels better from fresh air and being uncovered.

Hydrocyanic Acid 30c For convulsions, paralysis, very cold skin, icy cold hands,and feet, motionless or dilated pupils, bluish lips and pale face, cyanosis, rigidly clenched jaws, frothing at the mouth, noisy agitated breathing, weak irregular pulse, feeling of suffocation, chest pain, marked fear, incoherent speech, sudden loss of consciousness for no apparent reason and difficulty rising with staggering gait.

Moschus 30c For fainting without much provocation, accompanied by spasms and headache, convulsions and nervous trembling, unconscienceness with rigidity of the body (catalepsy), vertigo with sensation of falling from a great height, compulsive laughter, weak pulse and one cheek pale and cold while the other is hot and red.  The person feels worse from cold and better from rubbing or open air.
Ammonium Carb 30c For difficulty breathing, feeling of suffocation, unease, fainting spells and exhaustion from motion.

Choose one remedy and administer 1 dose every 10 to 30c, minutes.  Reassess after 6 doses.  When the person receiving the remedy is unconscious, use of the aqueous solution rubbed on the inner wrist or behind the ear is recommended.  Stop as soon as improvement is seen.

Opium 30c Use when the eyes are half open despite complete unconsciousness.  Other symptoms include involuntary urination and stool, full slow pulse, contracted pupils, red, bloodshot, glassy eyes, dusky deep red face and diabetic coma.
Gelsemium 30c For high temperature with cold extremities, hot head, mottled purple face, twitching eyes, heart palpitations and irregular pulse, drooping eyelids or ptosis.
Carbo Veg 30c For a corpse-like appearance with icy cold, blue skin, cold breath and very sluggish blood circulation.

Lachesis 30c For hemorrhage in the brain, tossing and turning even when unconscious, loss of consciousness in pregnancy during labor, convulsive movements, bluish face or coma following stroke or heart attack.

Helleborus Niger 30c For complete unconsciousness from concussive head injury, alternating pale or red face, coma from meningitis, sunstroke or pneumonia, tongue coated white or yellow with a red streak down the middle, lips, face, and hands that look dark and sooty, cold sweat on the head, rolling of the head, eyes half open with eyeballs rolled upward, lower jaw falls open, chewing motions and bad breath, difficulty breathing with gasping, thumbs tucked into the palms, involuntary movements of arm and leg, involuntary urination but no bowel activity and slow pulse and heartbeat.
Arnica Montana 30c For traumatic injury.  Despite being unconscious, the person can be roused when questioned and answers questions coherently but then falls back into unconsciousness.
Chloralum Hydratum 30c For deep coma lasting for days, unmoving and depressed action of the heart.  The person seems as though dead.
Ailanthus 30c For deep breathing, muttering delirium, dilated pupils, dark blackish face, purple mottled rash, watery discharge from nose and high fever.

Cicuta Virosa 30c For violent convulsions with the person covered in sweat, hiccoughs, bending of head and spine backward, unconsciousness from concussion, moaning or groaning, eczema, cold, red face, grinding and clenching or teeth, rigidity and unconscious staring.
Glonoinum 30c For unconsciousness from heat stroke, labored breathing, fixed eyes, high temperature and white tongue.
Nux Vomica 30c For unconsciousness from alcohol or drug poisoning, hot head and pale face and quick, hard pulse.
Nux Moschata 30c For dry skin, tongue, mouth and mucus membranes, lack of thirst and cold extremities.  The person seems intoxicated.
Cannabis Indica 30c For unconsciousness like a deep sleep troubled with nightmares, choking on swallowing, bloated face, pale clammy skin and dilated pupils.
Belladonna 30c For coma from fever with convulsions, spasms and twitching, hot red face and cold limbs.
Hydrocyanic Acid 30c For death-like symptoms
Antimonium Tartaricum 30c For sallow face, rattling mucus in the lungs, muttering delirium and whining when touched.
Zincum Metallicum 30c For trembling, convulsive movements, automatic motions, rolling of head from side to side and cold feet.

Baptisia 30c For the person who falls unconscious while being spoken to or while speaking. Other symptoms include high fever with dark red face, offensive discharges, yellow-coated tongue and delusions of the body being broken up into separate pieces.
Crotalus Horridus 30c For unconsciousness from septic fever.
Terebinthina 30c For the person who can be roused by shaking but falls back into unconsciousness, with lack of feeling in the extremities.
Aluminium Metallicum 30c For coma from diabetes.

Platina 30c For unconsciousness from puerperal fever ( A fever of 100.4 degrees F or higher  connected with or occurring during childbirth or withing 10 days following childbirth or postpartum infection)
Ranunculus Bulbosus 30c For unconsciousness from alcohol poisoning.
Digitalis 30c For coma after heart problems or circulatory problems.
China 30c For coma after loss of blood or other fluids.

Administer 1 dose every 10-30c, minutes as needed based upon severity.  As the person’s symptoms diminish in intensity, reduce the frequency of dosage to once every 1-4 hours. Stop as soon as improvement is seen.
[BP] For acute Stress Reaction:  Ignatia Amara 200c, 2D    Coffea cruda 200c, 2D
[BP] For mental shock: Ignatia Amara 200c, 2D    Coffee Cruda 200c, 2D

Ignatia 30c This is the primary remedy for all emotional shock.  For use after bereavements, grief or loss.  Symptoms include refusal to talk about feelings, sighing, lump in the throat, highly changeable moods, hysteria and over excitement, fainting from grief, worry, sudden bad news or in a crowded room and strong aversion to tobacco smoke.  The person feels worse from open air, eating, coffee and smoke.
Aconitum Napellus 30c For sudden fear associated with restlessness, overwhelming feelings of anxiety, conviction that death is eminent, hyperventilation and fainting from fright.

Coffea 30c For fainting from sudden joy or over excitement with great sensitivity.  The person is unusually active mentally or physically.  Use this remedy if the symptoms caused by fright are not relieved by Ignatia or Aconitum.  The person feels worse from strong odors, joy or sudden emotions or narcotics.

Opium 30c For fainting from apprehensiveness and fear or fright, with twitching of limbs and hysterical fits, red face and perspiration.  The person is withdrawn and slow to respond with a dazed, besotted expression.

Chamomilla 30c For dizziness, darkened vision, queasiness and faintness in the pit of the stomach, hot forehead, perspiring, fainting from severe pain, anger, hysteria or sudden emotion, irritability, intolerance and impatience.  The person feels worse from  heat, anger, fresh air and drafts and better from being carried.

Gelsemium 30c For fainting from anticipatory fear and fright, trembling limbs with frequent urination and diarrhea, subdued response with sleepiness, droopy eyes and dullness, inability to face challenge, worry about losing control, physical and mental helplessness, paralysis and terror after shock.  The person is paralyzed with fear.
Stramonium 30c Use after terrifying situations such as rape or violent physical assault, hysteria, night terrors and great fear.

Staphysagria 30c Use after surgery, when the person feels violated, experiencing feelings of shame, anger, humiliation or indignation, great physical and emotional sensitivity and stitching, shooting pains.

Cocculus Indicus 30c Use when a person expresses great anxiety for others.  Other symptoms include insomnia, fatigue with mental slowness and dullness and exhaustion from caring for others.  This remedy is perfect for rescue workers, car sickness or vertigo when looking at moving objects.

Calcarea Carbonica 30c For anxiety and fear for the future, worries that something bad will happen, feeling overwhelmed, fatigue and muscle weakness, coldness or sweating of single parts, hoarseness without pain, sliding down in the chair from weakness in the back, swelling of the upper lip, burning pain at the tip of the tongue, urgent need to take a deep breath, heart palpitations after meals, aversion to slimy food and a need for stability and security.  The person fears challenges and dislikes change.  The mental symptoms improve after physical exercise.
Arsenicum Album 30c For anxiety and restlessness.  The person is chilly, afraid to be alone, fastidious and attempts to maintain some control.

Lachesis 30c Use for women with a tendency to faint, after a pain in the heart, from fright or grief or in closed rooms.  Other symptoms include asthma, vertigo, nausea, vomiting, pale face, cold sweat, spasms, stiffness, hysteria and over excitement.  The person feels worse after sleep.

Phosphoric Acid 30c For nervous exhaustion, when mental or emotional strain leads to physical weakness or for fainting after a meal.  Other symptoms include listlessness, apathy, indifference, grief and mental shock.  The person feels worse from exercise, from being talked to and from loss of vital fluids and feels better from warmth.

remedies.condition: Shock - Electric shock and lightening strike      Because of the high water content of the human body, it is an effective conductor of electricity.  Exposure to a high voltage of electricity can kill or cause serious injury, including cardiac arrest, brain or organ damage, severe burns and muscle or nerve destruction from the current passing through the tissue.  There might be serious internal damage even if the person appears to have only minor external injury.  Often there are lingering chronic complaints afterward.
remedies: [BP] For electrocution or electric shock: Coffea cruda 200c, 2D
Arnica 30c For simple, less severe shocks with an aching, bruised-feeling with numbness.  The person says he is all right despite being injured, wants to be left alone and fears being touched.
Helleborus 30c For complete unconsciousness, sensory problems, lower jaw hanging open, grinding of the teeth and chewing motions and convulsions.
Morphinum 30c For vertigo from any head movement, a dreamlike semi-conscious state, trembling, twitching, jerking, convulsions, difficulty breathing and a pale or blue face.

Nux vomica 30c For irritability and anger, irritation from noises, odors and lights, aversion to being touched and convulsions with retained consciousness.  The person feels worse from touch and movement.

Phosphorus 30c For nervous symptoms, where even a small shock can cause violent palpitations with tightness in the chest, anxiety and vertigo, fainting, pale face, weak pulse, blindness, confusion and difficulty concentrating, memory problems and an aversion to being left alone.  The person feels worse from electrical changes, twilight, cold and on the left side and feels better from sympathy and warmth.

remedies.condition: The effects of electrical shock may include external or internal burns, open wounds, vision, speech or hearing problems, ruptured ear drums, numbness and tingling, convulsions, muscle spasms or contractions, difficulty breathing, heart arrhythmia, broken bones, unconsciousness, paralysis, cataracts, sleep problems, difficulties with memory, headache, fatigue, joint stiffness, dry eyes and emotional problems.  Do not touch person until source of electricity has been shut off.   Stay at least 20 feet away.  If a person is being exposed to an electrical current that you cannot shut off quickly, separate the person from the source of the current using an instrument made of non-conductive material such as wood, plastic or rubber.

Anacardium 30c - For a rash where scratching aggravates the itching and causes a burning sensation. Rubbing brings relief. Symptoms may be worse on the left side. Person may desire a warm drink and feels better in a warm environment, such as a warm room or bed or after a warm compress.
Calc Phos 6X - helpful for acnes or a pimply rash, with pale skin and possible anemia.

Croton Tiglium 30c - For multiple blisters with yellowish pus that resolve to grayish brown scabs, numerous small vesicles that may be pustular and surrounded by red areolas and tiny blisters that may later form into yellow, dry scabs. This remedy is particularly useful when the outbreak is located near the eyes or on the scalp, face, genitals, buttocks or lower limbs. Scratching aggravates the condition and leads to burning and pain. The rash tends to be left sided. The person has a feeling of overall tightness and finds the rash unbearable.

Graphites 30c - For a sticky, burning, honey-like discharge. Skin will have a crusty appearance, especially in the joint areas, torso and upper arms and legs. The person may dig and tear at the irritation to get relief from the itch.
Nat Mur 6X - For watery, clear discharges, with dry and intense itching.

Rhus tox 6X - For itching that is worse after warm applications or in a warm bed and worse at night, but hot showers bring relief. The symptoms are better with warm, dry air and motion. The person feels restless and irritable.

Sulphur 30c - Use when scratching the itchy area causes bleeding, and the bleeding brings relief. A white or yellow discharge may be present after itching. The person feels worse after a bath or cleaning up and feels better with the warmth of a bed. The person is irritable and has difficulty sleeping.

Variolinum (strong throat symptoms, intense itching of the skin, severe backache, cold hands and feet, weakness, inability to speak)

Veratrum Viride (rapid pulse, glistening eyes, red streak down center of tongue, chest congestion, nausea and vomiting, high fever with perspiration, delirium, flushed, bloated face, hot head, cold extremities)
Mercurius Sol (irritated mucous membranes, swollen tongue, great thirst, diarrhea burning, pustules, loss of hearing)
Mercurius Vivus (high fevers with profuse sweat, swollen glands, profuse fetid saliva, slimy greenish stools, metallic, bitter or salty taste in mouth)

Antimonium Tart (at any stage, especially before the rash appears, when dry teasing cough is present. Difficulty breathing, bluish or purplish face, drowsy, twitching, rattling breath, back pain, confusion, throbbing headache especially on the right, better sitting)

Phosphorus (bright red hemorrhage, fainting, exhaustion, bleeding from small points or individual spots, respiratory symptoms, hard, dry cough, desire for company and great thirst)
Hamamelis Virg (pox oozing dark blood, bleeding from nose, gums, rectum or genitals, bloody stools, tearing pains in lower back)

Secale (for thin slow painless oozing dark hemorrhage with offensive odor, cold skin and tingling in limbs, worse from motion)

remedies.condition: Stroke - Stroke: A stroke is the loss of brain function due to an interruption in blood flow to the brain.  Strokes can be caused by blockage of a blood vessel or hemorrhage of a blood vessel.  The area of the brain dependent upon the damaged blood vessel cannot function, and long-term neurological damage can result.  A stroke is a medical emergency, and it is important to seek emergency medical care immediately if it is available.  Every minute counts.  Symptoms include slurred speech, confusion/dizziness, numbness, tingling or paralysis, difficulty speaking, seeing or breathing, seizures, severe headache, uncontrolled urination and loss of consciousness.  Ask the person if he is okay.  Check the pulse.  Make sure the person is conscious and breathing.  Administer CPR if necessary.  Raise the head approximately 6 inches above the body.  Keep the person warm but not hot.  Choose one of the following remedies and administer e15M.  Stop when improvement is seen.  If the person has lost consciousness, administer e5M by rubbing the remedy on the wrist or behind the ear.
remedies: [BP] Rhus Tox 30c alternating with Arnica Montana 3c
[BP] Aconitum Napellus 200c twice per day to control and stabilize blood.
Arnica Montana 30c - This remedy’s keynote is controlling bleeding, and it has been used to address hemorrhagic stroke symptoms. It is also used for cerebral congestion, hemorrhages and thrombosis.
Nux Vomica 6c - Administer at the first indication of an attack brought on by a heavy meal or excess alcohol.
Aconite 30c - For the person who is conscious and terrified or panicky or for the person who experienced an emotional shock before the stroke symptoms began.

Belladonna 30c - For the person whose face is hot and flushed, with a headache and a wide, unfocused, staring gaze. The person may be confused or frightened, but these feelings have a quick onset and are intense. Use for cerebral hemorrhage.

Opium 6c - For the person who drifts in and out of consciousness. The face is cyanotic, and the person exhibits congested, heavily labored breathing. Administer one dose 4 times daily for up to 2 weeks for later stages of recovery.
Gelsemium 6c - For paralysis, weakness, numbness and trembling, loss of speech and pain at the back of the head. The person may also be dizzy and have trouble staying awake and alert.
Hyoscyamus 6c - For nervous agitation, delirium and vertigo. The person may have convulsions and loss of vision. Speech is garbled or gibberish. The person may clutch at his/her private parts.
Lachesis 6c - For delirium or impaired thinking, markedly slow and incoherent speech, vertigo, headache, hemorrhage, difficulty swallowing or shortness of breath.
Plumbum Metallicum 30c. - For stroke symptoms such as delirium, coma, convulsions, hypertension, ataxia, paralysis, problems grinding words and memory problems.
Baryta Carbonicum 6c - For elderly people and those who are physically and /or mentally weak. Other symptoms include aneurysm, memory problems, problems finding words and fatigue.
Aurum 6c - For the persons with depression and suicidal ideation after a stroke. The person may sob in his sleep and may experience double vision or hemianopia (seeing half the visual field).
Opium 6c - For the person with lapses of consciousness. Give 4D for up to 2 weeks for the later stages of recovery.
Arnica 6c - 4D for up to 3 weeks during recovery to control bleeding.

remedies.condition: Surgery Protocol   Here is how to use the remedies:  The more severe the pain, the more frequent the administration and the higher the potency required.  If you have any homeopathic education or experience, a higher potency can be used.  If homeopathy is rather new in your life, then use potencies such as 30c or 200c. For the sake of expediency, the remedies are indicated in a 200c.  One dose is generally 4 pills regardless of the size of the person taking it.
remedies: Arnica montana 200 is given morning and night on the day before surgery.  Then repeat the morning of and just before being wheeled into the operating room.  Remember that the purpose of Arnica is to keep infection at bay, minimize shock, reduce swelling, minimize possibility of hemorrhages and put the patient at ease.  Repeat as soon as possible after surgery and administered every 2-3 hours from that time on until consciousness is revived.  Then, repeat as often as required to eliminate pain.  If the pain is persistent, this indicates the need for more frequent repetition, perhaps every hour or two.

If pain is still a problem, Hypericum 200m is used as an alternate so that Arnica is administered, for example, every even hour and Hypericum every odd hour.  For those more familiar with homeopathy, 1 M or even 10M may be considered.
Sometimes other remedies are required, such as Staphysagria 200c for wound pain and infection
Nux Vomica 200c is generally used for nausea, constipation or diarrhea from the anesthetic
Phosphorus 200c also comes into the use as a powerful remedy for headaches and difficulty withdrawing from the anesthetic

Chamomilla 30c - For the person in unbearable pain. The person is irritable, cranky and hypersensitive from the toothache. Chamomilla is also useful for teething pain.
Hypericum 30c - For extreme pain, particularly when a nerve is injured. Hypericum helps to promote nerve regeneration and control the pain of traumatized nerves.
Mag Phos 30c - For a toothache with shooting pain that is made worse by cold and better by warmth and pressure.
Pulsatilla 30c - For the toothache with a stitching pain that is relieved by keeping cold water in the mouth and feels worse after hot food or drink.
Staphysagria 30c - For pain from major decay of multiple teeth and for loose teeth. The cheek may be swollen and red. Clenching the jaw alleviates the pain.

remedies.condition: Throat, infection    -  Throat Infection, Sore Throat.                                   Epiglottitis: A sore throat can be caused by general sickness, trauma, anemia or even tonsilitis.  Gargling with warm salt water can help relieve discomfort. Choose one, give e15min.
remedies: Belladonna 30c - Use when the sore throat comes on intensely and suddenly, the tongue is bright red and the throat burns and feels raw. Other indicators include a hot head, headache, dry mouth and painful swallowing. Think of Belladonna for acute tonsillitis.

Aconitum 30c - When used during the first hours of illness, Aconitum can abort a sore throat. The Throat is dry, rough, and burning. The person may be hoarse, and the eyes are shiny. (Note: Aconitum will antidote Belladonna)

Arsenicum Album 30c - Use when the sore throat starts out with post-nasal drip that is worse on the right side. The person feels restless and anxious and does not want to be alone and usually experiences fever and chills. The person feels better from warm food or drink and worse from cold food or drink and is thirsty for frequent sips of water.
Dulcamara 30c - If the sore throat began when the weather turned cold and damp, think of Dulcamara. The throat feels raw with burning pain and thick, sticky saliva.

Gelsemium 30c - For a sore throat that starts out slowly. The person feels sapped of energy. The body feels hot but the hands and feet are cold. The keynote is the feeling of total exhaustion and fatigue that accompany the illness.

Hepar Sulph 30c - If a person says their sore throat feels as if a small bone is lodged in the back of the throat, think of Hepar Sulph. The throat throbs, and the pain moves up into the ears when the person swallows. Hot drinks soothe the throat. The person is very irritable and does not want to be touched. They are also very sensitive to cold.

Merc Sol 30c - For a sore throat that is extremely raw and painful. There may be ulcers on the throat. The pain radiates up into the ears. The sore throat causes bad breath and excessive salivation and swallowing, but it hurts to swallow so the pillow may be pooled with saliva. The tongue has a yellow coating. The person feels worse at night.

Ammonium Carb 30c - For the beginning stages of a sore throat, with irritation at the top and back of the throat. The throat burns as if the person has just taken a shot of whisky, and it hurts to swallow.

Ferr Phos 30c - For slow onset of a sore throat or tonsillitis. The throat is red and swollen. It hurts to swallow, but the pain is relieved by a cool compress on the throat. This remedy is also used for a sore throat from singing or public speaking. Ferrum Phos can be employed as a prophylactic by taking it when others around you are sick.
Phytolacca 30c - For a sore throat with pain that goes up into the ears and it hurts to stick out the tongue, worse on the right side, with swollen glands in the neck.

Apis 30c - When the person’s throat hurts even when they are not swallowing, think of Apis. The throat glistens and looks very red, and the pain feels like stinging. Swallowing cool water or sucking on ice chips makes the throat feel better. Do not administer Apis during pregnancy.

Ignatia 30c - If the sore throat feels better when swallowing food and worse when swallowing saliva, think of Ignatia. This person often has had an emotional trauma or loss before they became ill, as in having a lump in the throat or laryngitis from holding back a deep emotion.

Lachesis 30c - For a sore throat that is worse on the left side with a constant tickle. The throat feels better when swallowing solid food (or warm liquids) and worse when swallowing saliva. The person does not want anything touching their throat, such as bedclothes, collars, mufflers, etc.

Lycopodium 30c - Use when the sore throat is worse on the right side or started on the right side and has moved to the left side. The person may feel as if their throat is swelling closed or they are choking. Cold liquids bring relief, but it hurts to swallow warm liquids.

Rhus Tox 30c - Is used when initial movement is painful and improves upon repetition, so in this type of sore throat, the more the person swallows, the more relief is felt. The person may start the day with hoarseness, but the voice returns to normal with talking. Other indicators include a red throat and a red triangle at the tip of the tongue.
Sulphur 30c - For a searing pain in the throat made worse by warm food or drinks. Cool drinks are soothing. The breath is unpleasant.

remedies.condition: UTI  - Choose one and give e15min
remedies: Nat Phos 6X - This is the number one remedy for UTIs. It can be given immediately and as often as once every 3-5 hours, which will buy you time as you discern between the other remedies. Once you find the best matched remedy in 30s, alternate that remedy with the Nat phos 6X. The 30th potency remedy can be taken every 3-4 hours.  Nat phos 6X is particularly indicated whenever there is an acid/alkaline imbalance. Key symptoms include an urge to urinate yet the person must wait for the urine to flow, burning pain and protein in the urine. The symptoms become worse after sexual relations an in the evening. Other symptoms include weakness, nervous weakness, strong urge to urinate and burning.

Ferrum Phos 30c - use this cell salt for any inflammatory state, especially where there is throbbing. Consider this remedy when the UTI is accompanied by a fever. The person may be nervous, anemic and sensitive, This cell salt, along with Nat Phos 6X can be alternated with any of the remedies listed below.

Aconitum 30c - Use when the body experiences a shock, for example, when a person swimming in a warm pool on a hot day jumps into a cold, air-conditioned car while still wet. If a UTI ensues, think of Aconitum. A fright, such as after an accident, can also be a call for Aconitum. Burning before urination as well as a sense of pressure in the bladder also point to this choice.

Cantharis 30c - For a strong urge to urinate, yet little is voided. The person may rush to the toilet and may urinate along the way. The bladder may feel full even after it has just been emptied. Sometimes a sense of frenzied desperation accompanies the infection, and the pain may make this symptom worse. Burning pain is a strong indication for Cantharis.

Berberis 30c - For burning pains in the urethra that feel better after urination and pain in the loins and thighs during urination. The urine may have thick mucus or bright red, mealy sediment or may be pale yellow. After urination, there is a feeling that urine remains in the bladder. The kidneys may feel sore, bubbling and burning, while a cutting and burning pain is felt in the bladder. Sticking, cutting and violent pains may travel from the kidneys into the bladder and urethra

Pulsatilla 30c - For the person who leaks urine when coughing, laughing or sneezing. The victim is often a soft, round, feminine-type who gets a bit weepy when she gets these infections. Nausea and other gastrointestinal issues may also be present, particularly from eating ice cream or other rich creamy foods. Urination may smart, but it is nowhere near as painful as the picture presented by the other remedies.

Nux Vomica 30c - For a UTI resulting from overindulgence of stimulating foods such as chocolate, caffeinated beverages or poor quality foods. Nux is also useful for those who experience anxiety or frustration when ambition is impeded. The person will likely be irritable and wake up in the night between 3-4 a.m. Other symptoms include the need to have a bowel movement at the same time as the urine urgency, chills and an extreme urgency to urinate.

Sarsaparilla 30c - A Sarsaparilla UTI has pain that is worse at the end of urinating. The urine flows in dribbles and sometimes the woman is unable to complete the void unless standing. This remedy is useful for burning pain but pain may not be the most pressing symptom.

remedies.condition: UTI - Choose one and give e15min
remedies: Staphysagria 30c - This remedy has a reputation for aiding girls who suffer UTIs after being abused, either physically or emotionally, or after a recent embarrassment. So common is Staphysagria in this malady that it should be considered if no other remedy seems to fit the picture of the symptoms.

Arnica Montana 30c - As the quintessential remedy for injuries, Arnica is indicated for a UTI that comes on after an accident. One remarkable characteristic of the need of Arnica is an inability to empty the bladder, usually due to injury to the perineum. There may be some dribbling of urine as well.

Apis 30c - For a UTI with white, thick and milky urine and coffee-ground-like sediment. The urine may also be dark and bloody, scanty, hot and burning and accompanied by an offensive odor. The kind of pain experienced by someone who needs Apis is like a bee sting: stinging, hot burning and perhaps accompanied by a swelling sensation.

Equisetum 30c - For a bladder that always feels full, with severe, dull pain. Despite the fact that the person always feels a need to urinate, only a few drops may be produced. Additional symptoms include mucus in the urine and a severe burning pain in the urethra during urination, which may worsen at the close of urination and is followed by a sudden urge to urinate again.
Cantharis 30c, 2-3D, if more severe e3H.

potencies.label: C
potencies.description: centesimal dilutions The most common type of dilutions is “C” dilutions (centesimal dilutions). The 1C is obtained by mixing 1 part of the Mother Tincture with 9 parts of ethanol in a new vial and then vigorously shaking the solution (succussion). The result is a 1/100 dilution of the plant (the Mother Tincture being a 1/10 dilution of the plant itself). The 2C is obtained by mixing 1 part of the 1C with 99 parts of ethanol in a new vial and succussing. Recurrently, the 3C is obtained by mixing 1 part of the 2C with 99 parts of ethanol in a new vial and succussing.

potencies.label: X
potencies.description: Decimal dilutions X dilutions are decimal dilutions prepared similarly to C dilutions, but the factor of dilution is only 1/10 from one dilution to the next.

potencies.label: K
potencies.description: The K refers to a method of manufacturing known as the Korsakovian method. The Korsakovian method dilutes the homeopathic preparation of the substance at the rate of 1 part of the previous dilution with 99 parts of solvent.

potencies.label: CK
potencies.description: Korsakovian dilutions are manufactured using a device specially designed to ensure that the dilution process is reproducible from one dilution to the next. Only one vial is used for the entire process. Using ultra-purified water as the solvent, the machine removes 99% of the Mother Tincture and replaces it with the same volume of solvent. The vial is succussed for 10.5 seconds. The result is called 1CK. The 2CK is prepared identically from the 1CK. The automatic process using only 1 vial allows higher dilutions to be reached. The most common Korsakovian dilutions are 200CK, 1,000CK (also called 1M), 10,000CK (10M), 50,000 CK (50M) and 100,000CK (100M or CM). 200CK means that the substance has been homeopathically diluted 200 times at the rate of 1 to 100.
